\ No newline at end of file
diff --git a/centos-6/cuda/8.0/runtime/cudnn5/Dockerfile b/centos-6/cuda/8.0/runtime/cudnn5/Dockerfile
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..0266d32
--- /dev/null
+++ b/centos-6/cuda/8.0/runtime/cudnn5/Dockerfile
@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+FROM cuda:8.0-runtime
+MAINTAINER NVIDIA CORPORATION <digits@nvidia.com>
+
+ENV CUDNN_VERSION 5
+LABEL com.nvidia.cudnn.version="5"
+
+RUN CUDNN_DOWNLOAD_SUM=a87cb2df2e5e7cc0a05e266734e679ee1a2fadad6f06af82a76ed81a23b102c8 && \
+    curl -fsSL http://developer.download.nvidia.com/compute/redist/cudnn/v5.1/cudnn-8.0-linux-x64-v5.1.tgz -O && \
+    echo "$CUDNN_DOWNLOAD_SUM  cudnn-8.0-linux-x64-v5.1.tgz" | sha256sum -c - && \
+    tar -xzf cudnn-8.0-linux-x64-v5.1.tgz -C /usr/local --wildcards 'cuda/lib64/libcudnn.so.*' && \
+    rm cudnn-8.0-linux-x64-v5.1.tgz && \
+    ldconfig
diff --git a/centos-6/cuda/Makefile b/centos-6/cuda/Makefile
index 3cfe735..b7b248c 100644
--- a/centos-6/cuda/Makefile
+++ b/centos-6/cuda/Makefile
@@ -1,7 +1,9 @@

author: Christy Perez
message: Fix ldcache path lookup for ppc64le
patch:
commit 18b5d4c330691ee2762d7d0eb725ce2879476392
Author: Christy Perez <christy@linux.vnet.ibm.com>
Date:   Tue Aug 2 09:49:44 2016 -0400

    Fix ldcache path lookup for ppc64le
    
    Closes: #194
    Signed-off-by: Christy Perez <christy@linux.vnet.ibm.com>
    Signed-off-by: Jonathan Calmels <jcalmels@nvidia.com>
---
 tools/src/ldcache/ldcache.go | 11 +++++++----
 1 file changed, 7 insertions(+), 4 deletions(-)

diff --git a/tools/src/ldcache/ldcache.go b/tools/src/ldcache/ldcache.go
index 457c406..f68f568 100644
--- a/tools/src/ldcache/ldcache.go
+++ b/tools/src/ldcache/ldcache.go
@@ -24,10 +24,11 @@ const (
 	flagTypeMask = 0x00ff
 	flagTypeELF  = 0x0001
 
-	flagArchMask  = 0xff00
-	flagArchI386  = 0x0000
-	flagArchX8664 = 0x0300
-	flagArchX32   = 0x0800
+	flagArchMask    = 0xff00
+	flagArchI386    = 0x0000
+	flagArchX8664   = 0x0300
+	flagArchX32     = 0x0800
+	flagArchPpc64le = 0x0500
 )
 
 var ErrInvalidCache = errors.New("invalid ld.so.cache file")
@@ -156,6 +157,8 @@ func (c *LDCache) Lookup(libs ...string) (paths32, paths64 []string) {
 		}
 		switch e.Flags & flagArchMask {
 		case flagArchX8664:
+			fallthrough
+		case flagArchPpc64le:
 			paths = &paths64
 		case flagArchX32:
 			fallthrough

author: Felix Abecassis
message: Update DIGITS 4.0 to use the new deb package
patch:
commit 257f5d61f774b41f5b80453ce8b29eb5b01cdbea
Author: Felix Abecassis <fabecassis@nvidia.com>
Date:   Thu Aug 11 21:41:06 2016 -0700

    Update DIGITS 4.0 to use the new deb package
---
 mk/digits.mk                       |  2 +-
 ubuntu-14.04/digits/4.0/Dockerfile | 43 +++++++++++---------------------------
 2 files changed, 13 insertions(+), 32 deletions(-)

diff --git a/mk/digits.mk b/mk/digits.mk
index 7d4e115..897bd75 100644
--- a/mk/digits.mk
+++ b/mk/digits.mk
@@ -24,5 +24,5 @@ latest: $(DIGITS_LATEST)
 	$(NV_DOCKER) build -t digits:$@ $(CURDIR)/$@
 
 4.0: $(CURDIR)/4.0/Dockerfile
-	make -C $(CURDIR)/../caffe 0.14
+	make -C $(CURDIR)/../caffe 0.15
 	$(NV_DOCKER) build -t digits:$@ $(CURDIR)/$@
diff --git a/ubuntu-14.04/digits/4.0/Dockerfile b/ubuntu-14.04/digits/4.0/Dockerfile
index 159dbe7..8acc509 100644
--- a/ubuntu-14.04/digits/4.0/Dockerfile
+++ b/ubuntu-14.04/digits/4.0/Dockerfile
@@ -1,38 +1,18 @@
-FROM caffe:0.14
+FROM caffe:0.15
 MAINTAINER NVIDIA CORPORATION <digits@nvidia.com>
 
-# workaround: gcc and libhdf5-dev are dependencies that are currently missing from the torch package
-RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends --force-yes \
-        gcc \
-        git \
-        graphviz \
-        gunicorn \
-        libhdf5-dev \
-        nginx \
-        python-caffe-nv \
-        python-flask \
-        python-flaskext.socketio \
-        python-flaskext.wtf \
-        python-gevent \
-        python-lmdb \
-        python-pil \
-        python-pip \
-        python-pydot \
-        python-requests \
-        python-six \
-        python-skimage \
-        python-wtforms \
-        torch7-nv=0.9.98-1+cuda7.5 && \
-    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
-
 ENV DIGITS_VERSION 4.0
 LABEL com.nvidia.digits.version="4.0"
 
-WORKDIR /opt/digits
-
-ENV CLONE_TAG=v4.0.0
-RUN git clone -b ${CLONE_TAG} --depth 1 https://github.com/NVIDIA/DIGITS.git . && \
-    for req in $(cat requirements.txt); do pip install $req; done
+# workaround: gcc and libhdf5-dev are dependencies that are currently missing from the torch package
+ENV DIGITS_PKG_VERSION 4.0.0-1
+RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends --force-yes \
+            torch7-nv=0.9.99-1+cuda7.5 \
+            graphviz \
+            gcc \
+            libhdf5-dev \
+            digits=$DIGITS_PKG_VERSION && \
+    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
 
 VOLUME /data
 VOLUME /jobs
@@ -40,4 +20,5 @@ VOLUME /jobs
 COPY digits.cfg digits/digits.cfg
 
 EXPOSE 34448
-ENTRYPOINT ["/opt/digits/digits-server"]
+WORKDIR /usr/share/digits
+ENTRYPOINT ["./digits-server"]

author: Felix Abecassis

+	make -C $(CURDIR)/../cuda 7.5-cudnn5-runtime
+	$(NV_DOCKER) build -t caffe:$@ $(CURDIR)/$@
+
 0.14: $(CURDIR)/0.14/Dockerfile
 	make -C $(CURDIR)/../cuda 7.5-cudnn5-runtime
 	$(NV_DOCKER) build -t caffe:$@ $(CURDIR)/$@

new file mode 100644

--- /dev/null
+++ b/ubuntu-14.04/caffe/0.15/Dockerfile
@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+FROM cuda:7.5-cudnn5-runtime
+MAINTAINER NVIDIA CORPORATION <digits@nvidia.com>
+
+ENV CAFFE_VERSION 0.15
+LABEL com.nvidia.caffe.version="0.15"
+
+ENV CAFFE_PKG_VERSION 0.15.9-1+cuda7.5

+        caffe-nv-tools=$CAFFE_PKG_VERSION \

+        libcaffe-nv0=$CAFFE_PKG_VERSION && \
+    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

author: Felix Abecassis
message: Use official CUDA 8.0 RC patch to enable gcc 5.4 support
patch:
commit e902b49cb747fdd4ebbe7bcd3b9a9bcf6869ba77
Author: Felix Abecassis <fabecassis@nvidia.com>
Date:   Mon Aug 8 22:08:49 2016 -0700

    Use official CUDA 8.0 RC patch to enable gcc 5.4 support
    
    Closes: #167
---
 ubuntu-16.04/cuda/8.0/devel/Dockerfile | 7 +++++++
 1 file changed, 7 insertions(+)

diff --git a/ubuntu-16.04/cuda/8.0/devel/Dockerfile b/ubuntu-16.04/cuda/8.0/devel/Dockerfile
index 37047eb..109d1f3 100644
--- a/ubuntu-16.04/cuda/8.0/devel/Dockerfile
+++ b/ubuntu-16.04/cuda/8.0/devel/Dockerfile
@@ -23,4 +23,11 @@ RUN curl -o cuda-repo.deb -fsSL http://developer.download.nvidia.com/compute/cud
     apt-get remove --purge -y cuda-repo-ubuntu1604-8-0-rc && \
     rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
 
+# workaround: CUDA 8.0 RC doesn't support gcc 5.4 without the following patch
+ENV PATCH_DOWNLOAD_SUM 05c465d509f92b41b8a0022abdbcbaeaa8f6a9d98dc03db1e0d8d2506e056efd
+RUN curl -o patch.deb -fsSL http://developer.download.nvidia.com/compute/cuda/8.0/direct/cuda-misc-headers-8-0_8.0.27.1-1_amd64.deb && \
+    echo "$PATCH_DOWNLOAD_SUM  patch.deb" | sha256sum -c --strict - && \
+    dpkg -i patch.deb && \
+    rm patch.deb
+
 ENV LIBRARY_PATH /usr/local/cuda/lib64/stubs:${LIBRARY_PATH}

new file mode 100644

--- /dev/null
+++ b/ubuntu-14.04/cuda/8.0/devel/Dockerfile
@@ -0,0 +1,26 @@
+FROM cuda:8.0-runtime
+MAINTAINER NVIDIA CORPORATION <digits@nvidia.com>
+
+RUN curl -o cuda-repo.deb -fsSL http://developer.download.nvidia.com/compute/cuda/8.0/direct/cuda-repo-ubuntu1404-8-0-rc_8.0.27-1_amd64.deb && \
+    echo "$CUDA_DOWNLOAD_SUM  cuda-repo.deb" | sha256sum -c --strict - && \
+    dpkg -i cuda-repo.deb && \
+    rm cuda-repo.deb && \
+    apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
+        cuda-core-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-misc-headers-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-command-line-tools-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-nvrtc-dev-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-nvml-dev-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-nvgraph-dev-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-cusolver-dev-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-cublas-dev-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-cufft-dev-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-curand-dev-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-cusparse-dev-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-npp-dev-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-cudart-dev-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-driver-dev-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION && \
+    apt-get remove --purge -y cuda-repo-ubuntu1404-8-0-rc && \
+    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
+
+ENV LIBRARY_PATH /usr/local/cuda/lib64/stubs:${LIBRARY_PATH}

+
+RUN curl -fsSL http://developer.download.nvidia.com/compute/redist/cudnn/v5/cudnn-8.0-linux-x64-v5.0-ga.tgz -O && \
+    echo "$CUDNN_DOWNLOAD_SUM  cudnn-8.0-linux-x64-v5.0-ga.tgz" | sha256sum -c --strict - && \

diff --git a/ubuntu-14.04/cuda/8.0/runtime/Dockerfile b/ubuntu-14.04/cuda/8.0/runtime/Dockerfile
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..7424866
--- /dev/null
+++ b/ubuntu-14.04/cuda/8.0/runtime/Dockerfile
@@ -0,0 +1,43 @@
+FROM ubuntu:14.04
+MAINTAINER NVIDIA CORPORATION <digits@nvidia.com>
+
+LABEL com.nvidia.volumes.needed="nvidia_driver"
+
+RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
+        ca-certificates \
+        curl && \
+    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
+
+ENV CUDA_VERSION 8.0
+LABEL com.nvidia.cuda.version="8.0"
+
+ENV CUDA_DOWNLOAD_SUM 9edcebbe8b646e40317f9ab822a733e10146003a73fc775a089226630121da7b
+
+ENV CUDA_PKG_VERSION 8-0=8.0.27-1
+RUN curl -o cuda-repo.deb -fsSL http://developer.download.nvidia.com/compute/cuda/8.0/direct/cuda-repo-ubuntu1404-8-0-rc_8.0.27-1_amd64.deb && \
+    echo "$CUDA_DOWNLOAD_SUM  cuda-repo.deb" | sha256sum -c --strict - && \
+    dpkg -i cuda-repo.deb && \
+    rm cuda-repo.deb && \
+    apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
+        cuda-nvrtc-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-nvgraph-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-cusolver-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-cublas-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-cufft-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-curand-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-cusparse-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-npp-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-cudart-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION && \
+    ln -s cuda-$CUDA_VERSION /usr/local/cuda && \
+    apt-get remove --purge -y cuda-repo-ubuntu1404-8-0-rc && \
+    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
+
+RUN echo "/usr/local/cuda/lib" >> /etc/ld.so.conf.d/cuda.conf && \
+    echo "/usr/local/cuda/lib64" >> /etc/ld.so.conf.d/cuda.conf && \
+    ldconfig
+
+RUN echo "/usr/local/nvidia/lib" >> /etc/ld.so.conf.d/nvidia.conf && \
+    echo "/usr/local/nvidia/lib64" >> /etc/ld.so.conf.d/nvidia.conf
+
+ENV PATH /usr/local/nvidia/bin:/usr/local/cuda/bin:${PATH}
+ENV LD_LIBRARY_PATH /usr/local/nvidia/lib:/usr/local/nvidia/lib64:${LD_LIBRARY_PATH}

\ No newline at end of file
diff --git a/centos-7/cuda/8.0/runtime/cudnn5/Dockerfile b/centos-7/cuda/8.0/runtime/cudnn5/Dockerfile
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..6b2b327
--- /dev/null
+++ b/centos-7/cuda/8.0/runtime/cudnn5/Dockerfile
@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+FROM cuda:8.0-runtime
+MAINTAINER NVIDIA CORPORATION <digits@nvidia.com>
+
+ENV CUDNN_VERSION 5
+LABEL com.nvidia.cudnn.version="5"
+
+ENV CUDNN_DOWNLOAD_SUM af80eb1ce0cb51e6a734b2bdc599e6d50b676eab3921e5bddfe5443485df86b6
+
+RUN curl -fsSL http://developer.download.nvidia.com/compute/redist/cudnn/v5/cudnn-8.0-linux-x64-v5.0-ga.tgz -O && \

+    rm cudnn-8.0-linux-x64-v5.0-ga.tgz && \
+    ldconfig

author: Felix Abecassis
message: Pin version of libcudnn5 package to 5.0.5
patch:
commit e7a0e2be1c97f3745c1874e28adf09d1e14440bf
Author: Felix Abecassis <fabecassis@nvidia.com>
Date:   Mon Jul 11 14:30:35 2016 -0700

    Pin version of libcudnn5 package to 5.0.5
    
    Workaround for a packaging bug with libcudnn5-dev. This package should
    have an exact version dependency on the runtime library, see the
    debian policy manual:
    https://www.debian.org/doc/debian-policy/ch-sharedlibs.html#s-sharedlibs-intradeps
    
    Reported by @cbiffle.
    
    Closes: #131
---
 ubuntu-14.04/cuda/7.5/devel/cudnn5/Dockerfile | 2 ++
 1 file changed, 2 insertions(+)

diff --git a/ubuntu-14.04/cuda/7.5/devel/cudnn5/Dockerfile b/ubuntu-14.04/cuda/7.5/devel/cudnn5/Dockerfile
index 7282c94..8470dba 100644
--- a/ubuntu-14.04/cuda/7.5/devel/cudnn5/Dockerfile
+++ b/ubuntu-14.04/cuda/7.5/devel/cudnn5/Dockerfile
@@ -6,6 +6,8 @@ RUN echo "deb http://developer.download.nvidia.com/compute/machine-learning/repo
 ENV CUDNN_VERSION 5
 LABEL com.nvidia.cudnn.version="5"
 
+# workaround: libcudnn5-dev should have an exact version dependency on the runtime library libcudnn5
 RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends --force-yes \
+            libcudnn5=5.0.5-1+cuda7.5 \
             libcudnn5-dev=5.0.5-1+cuda7.5 && \
     rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

author: Steven Peters

@@ -41,7 +41,7 @@ func LoadUVM() error {
 		return err

author: Jonathan Calmels
patch:
commit 09ab8cbc2d0ad9c118bad935f35a2a32d56d3cec
Author: Jonathan Calmels <jcalmels@nvidia.com>
Date:   Fri Jun 17 15:02:36 2016 -0700

    Fix minor Makefile issues
---
 Makefile       | 3 +++
 tools/Makefile | 6 +++---
 2 files changed, 6 insertions(+), 3 deletions(-)

diff --git a/Makefile b/Makefile
index b3617e1..51415bb 100644
--- a/Makefile
+++ b/Makefile
@@ -36,6 +36,9 @@ tarball:
 cuda: $(CURDIR)/$(OS)/cuda
 	make -C $(CURDIR)/$(OS)/cuda
 
+opencl: $(CURDIR)/$(OS)/opencl
+	make -C $(CURDIR)/$(OS)/opencl
+
 caffe: $(CURDIR)/$(OS)/caffe
 	make -C $(CURDIR)/$(OS)/caffe
 
diff --git a/tools/Makefile b/tools/Makefile
index b6f3722..8855aec 100644
--- a/tools/Makefile
+++ b/tools/Makefile
@@ -43,7 +43,7 @@ DOCKER_BUILD     := $(NV_DOCKER) build --build-arg USER_ID="$(shell id -u)" \
 
 all: build
 
-build:
+build: distclean
 ifneq ($(DOCKER_SUPPORTED),true)
 	$(error Unsupported Docker version)
 endif
@@ -62,12 +62,12 @@ uninstall:
 clean:
 	-@$(DOCKER_IMAGES) | xargs $(DOCKER_RMI) 2> /dev/null
 	-@$(DOCKER_RMI) golang:1.5 ubuntu:14.04 centos:7 2> /dev/null
-	@rm -rf $(BIN_DIR)
 
 distclean:
+	@rm -rf $(BIN_DIR)

-tarball: build distclean

 	@mkdir -p $(DIST_DIR)
 	tar --transform='s;.*/;$(PKG_NAME)/;' -caf $(DIST_DIR)/$(PKG_NAME)_$(PKG_VERS)_$(PKG_ARCH).tar.xz $(BIN_DIR)/*
 	@printf "\nFind tarball at $(DIST_DIR)\n\n"

author: Felix Abecassis
patch:
commit 4229aad40cf3504af0f1868c03566b23f597f0ee
Author: Felix Abecassis <fabecassis@nvidia.com>
Date:   Fri Jun 17 15:27:56 2016 -0700

    Add support for Docker 1.12
---
 tools/src/docker/docker.go | 12 ++++++++++++

diff --git a/tools/src/docker/docker.go b/tools/src/docker/docker.go
index 4dc2391..60169b5 100644
--- a/tools/src/docker/docker.go
+++ b/tools/src/docker/docker.go
@@ -81,6 +81,18 @@ var booleanFlags = map[string]map[string][]string{
 			"-privileged", "-publish-all", "P", "-read-only", "-tty", "t", // same as "create"
 			"-detach", "d", "-rm", "-sig-proxy"},
 	},
+	"1.12": {
+		"": []string{"-debug", "D", "-tls", "-tlsverify"}, // global options
+		"daemon": []string{"-debug", "D", "-tls", "-tlsverify", // global options
+			"-disable-legacy-registry", "-help", "-icc", "-ip-forward",
+			"-ip-masq", "-iptables", "-ipv6", "-live-restore", "-raw-logs",
+			"-selinux-enabled", "-userland-proxy"},
+		"create": []string{"-disable-content-trust", "-help", "-interactive", "i", "-oom-kill-disable",
+			"-privileged", "-publish-all", "P", "-read-only", "-tty", "t"},
+		"run": []string{"-disable-content-trust", "-help", "-interactive", "i", "-oom-kill-disable",
+			"-privileged", "-publish-all", "P", "-read-only", "-tty", "t", // same as "create"
+			"-detach", "d", "-no-healthcheck", "-rm", "-sig-proxy"},
+	},
 }
 
 func ParseArgs(args []string, cmd ...string) (string, int, error) {

 NVIDIA_DOCKER_USER=#PACKAGE#

     ;;

index 63b45f7..5ca3111 100644
--- a/tools/build/deb/nvidia-docker.prerm
+++ b/tools/build/deb/nvidia-docker.prerm
@@ -7,9 +7,10 @@ NVIDIA_DOCKER_ROOT=/var/lib/nvidia-docker
 
 case "$1" in
     remove)
-        echo "Purging NVIDIA volumes ..."
-        docker volume ls | awk -v drv="$NVIDIA_DOCKER_DRIVER" '{if ($1 == drv) print $2}' | xargs -r docker volume rm
-        find "$NVIDIA_DOCKER_ROOT" ! -wholename "$NVIDIA_DOCKER_ROOT" -type d -empty -delete
+        echo "Purging NVIDIA volumes"
+        docker volume ls | awk -v drv="$NVIDIA_DOCKER_DRIVER" '{if ($1 == drv) print $2}' | xargs -r docker volume rm ||
+            echo "Failed to remove NVIDIA volumes, ignoring"
+        find "$NVIDIA_DOCKER_ROOT" ! -wholename "$NVIDIA_DOCKER_ROOT" -type d -empty -delete || true
     ;;
 
     upgrade|deconfigure|failed-upgrade)
diff --git a/tools/build/rpm/SPECS/nvidia-docker.spec b/tools/build/rpm/SPECS/nvidia-docker.spec
index 4e1d2af..e853cfe 100644
--- a/tools/build/rpm/SPECS/nvidia-docker.spec
+++ b/tools/build/rpm/SPECS/nvidia-docker.spec
@@ -47,16 +47,20 @@ install -m 644 -t %{buildroot}%{_unitdir} %{name}.service
 
 %post
 if [ $1 -eq 1 ]; then
+    echo "Configuring user"
     id -u %{nvidia_docker_user} >/dev/null 2>&1 || \
     useradd -r -M -d %{nvidia_docker_root} -s /usr/sbin/nologin -c "NVIDIA Docker plugin" %{nvidia_docker_user}
     chown %{nvidia_docker_user}: %{nvidia_docker_root}
 fi
+echo "Setting up permissions"
 setcap cap_fowner+pe %{_bindir}/nvidia-docker-plugin
 %systemd_post %{name}
 
 %preun
 if [ $1 -eq 0 ]; then
-    docker volume ls | awk -v drv=%{nvidia_docker_driver} '{if ($1 == drv) print $2}' | xargs -r docker volume rm || exit 1
+    echo "Purging NVIDIA volumes"
+    docker volume ls | awk -v drv=%{nvidia_docker_driver} '{if ($1 == drv) print $2}' | xargs -r docker volume rm ||
+        echo "Failed to remove NVIDIA volumes, ignoring"
     find %{nvidia_docker_root} ! -wholename %{nvidia_docker_root} -type d -empty -delete
 fi
 %systemd_preun %{name}

Author: Felix Abecassis <fabecassis@nvidia.com>
Date:   Tue Jun 14 15:46:57 2016 -0700

    Add Dockerfile for DIGITS 4.0
    
    Closes: #111
---
 mk/digits.mk                       |  4 ++++
 ubuntu-14.04/digits/4.0/Dockerfile | 43 ++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
 ubuntu-14.04/digits/4.0/digits.cfg |  3 +++
 ubuntu-14.04/digits/Makefile       |  3 ++-
 4 files changed, 52 insertions(+), 1 deletion(-)

diff --git a/mk/digits.mk b/mk/digits.mk
index 7a32fb9..7d4e115 100644
--- a/mk/digits.mk
+++ b/mk/digits.mk
@@ -22,3 +22,7 @@ latest: $(DIGITS_LATEST)
 3.3: $(CURDIR)/3.3/Dockerfile
 	make -C $(CURDIR)/../caffe 0.14
 	$(NV_DOCKER) build -t digits:$@ $(CURDIR)/$@
+
+4.0: $(CURDIR)/4.0/Dockerfile
+	make -C $(CURDIR)/../caffe 0.14
+	$(NV_DOCKER) build -t digits:$@ $(CURDIR)/$@
diff --git a/ubuntu-14.04/digits/4.0/Dockerfile b/ubuntu-14.04/digits/4.0/Dockerfile
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..665979b
--- /dev/null
+++ b/ubuntu-14.04/digits/4.0/Dockerfile
@@ -0,0 +1,43 @@
+FROM caffe:0.14
+MAINTAINER NVIDIA CORPORATION <digits@nvidia.com>
+
+# workaround: gcc and libhdf5-dev are dependencies that are currently missing from the torch package
+RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends --force-yes \
+        gcc \
+        git \
+        graphviz \
+        gunicorn \
+        libhdf5-dev \
+        nginx \
+        python-caffe-nv \
+        python-flask \
+        python-flaskext.socketio \
+        python-flaskext.wtf \
+        python-gevent \
+        python-lmdb \
+        python-pil \
+        python-pip \
+        python-pydot \
+        python-requests \
+        python-six \
+        python-skimage \
+        python-wtforms \
+        torch7-nv=0.9.98-1+cuda7.5 && \
+    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
+
+ENV DIGITS_VERSION 4.0
+LABEL com.nvidia.digits.version="4.0"
+
+WORKDIR /opt/digits
+
+ENV CLONE_TAG=v4.0.0-rc.1
+RUN git clone -b ${CLONE_TAG} --depth 1 https://github.com/NVIDIA/DIGITS.git . && \
+    for req in $(cat requirements.txt); do pip install $req; done
+
+VOLUME /data
+VOLUME /jobs
+
+COPY digits.cfg digits/digits.cfg
+
+EXPOSE 34448
+ENTRYPOINT ["/opt/digits/digits-server"]
diff --git a/ubuntu-14.04/digits/4.0/digits.cfg b/ubuntu-14.04/digits/4.0/digits.cfg
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..545cb5c
--- /dev/null
+++ b/ubuntu-14.04/digits/4.0/digits.cfg
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+[DIGITS]
+jobs_dir = /jobs
+log_file = /jobs/digits.log
diff --git a/ubuntu-14.04/digits/Makefile b/ubuntu-14.04/digits/Makefile
index a525c49..51d54c3 100644
--- a/ubuntu-14.04/digits/Makefile
+++ b/ubuntu-14.04/digits/Makefile
@@ -1,6 +1,7 @@
 # Copyright (c) 2016, NVIDIA CORPORATION. All rights reserved.
 
-DIGITS_VERSIONS := 3.3 \
+DIGITS_VERSIONS := 4.0 \
+                   3.3 \
                    3.0
 
 include ../../mk/digits.mk

+wget -P /tmp https://github.com/NVIDIA/nvidia-docker/releases/download/v1.0.0-rc.2/nvidia-docker_1.0.0.rc.2-1_amd64.deb
+sudo dpkg -i /tmp/nvidia-docker*.deb && rm /tmp/nvidia-docker*.deb
 
 # Test nvidia-smi
 nvidia-docker run --rm nvidia/cuda nvidia-smi
 ```
 
-##### _Other distributions_
+#### _CentOS distributions_
 ```sh
 # Install nvidia-docker and nvidia-docker-plugin
-wget -P /tmp https://github.com/NVIDIA/nvidia-docker/releases/download/v1.0.0-rc/nvidia-docker_1.0.0.rc_amd64.tar.xz
-sudo tar --strip-components=1 -C /usr/bin -xvf /tmp/nvidia-docker_1.0.0.rc_amd64.tar.xz && rm /tmp/nvidia-docker*.tar.xz
-
-# Run nvidia-docker-plugin
-sudo -b nohup nvidia-docker-plugin > /tmp/nvidia-docker.log
+wget -P /tmp https://github.com/NVIDIA/nvidia-docker/releases/download/v1.0.0-rc.2/nvidia-docker-1.0.0.rc.2-1.x86_64.rpm
+sudo rpm -i /tmp/nvidia-docker*.rpm && rm /tmp/nvidia-docker*.rpm
+sudo systemctl start nvidia-docker
 
 # Test nvidia-smi
 nvidia-docker run --rm nvidia/cuda nvidia-smi
 ```
 
-### Standalone install
+#### _Other distributions_
 ```sh
 # Install nvidia-docker and nvidia-docker-plugin
-wget -P /tmp https://github.com/NVIDIA/nvidia-docker/releases/download/v1.0.0-rc/nvidia-docker_1.0.0.rc_amd64.tar.xz
-sudo tar --strip-components=1 -C /usr/bin -xvf /tmp/nvidia-docker_1.0.0.rc_amd64.tar.xz && rm /tmp/nvidia-docker*.tar.xz
+wget -P /tmp https://github.com/NVIDIA/nvidia-docker/releases/download/v1.0.0-rc.2/nvidia-docker_1.0.0.rc.2_amd64.tar.xz
+sudo tar --strip-components=1 -C /usr/bin -xvf /tmp/nvidia-docker*.tar.xz && rm /tmp/nvidia-docker*.tar.xz
 
-# One-time setup
-sudo nvidia-docker volume setup
+# Run nvidia-docker-plugin
+sudo -b nohup nvidia-docker-plugin > /tmp/nvidia-docker.log
 
 # Test nvidia-smi
 nvidia-docker run --rm nvidia/cuda nvidia-smi

author: Jonathan Calmels
patch:
commit 9fdb5f63c66fd31b08d2976230699b4661cdf0d9
Author: Jonathan Calmels <jcalmels@nvidia.com>
Date:   Fri May 27 16:31:50 2016 -0700

    Merge OpenCL images [experimental]
    
    Closes: #17
---
 mk/opencl.mk                           | 20 ++++++++++++++++++++
 ubuntu-14.04/opencl/Makefile           |  3 +++
 ubuntu-14.04/opencl/devel/Dockerfile   |  7 +++++++
 ubuntu-14.04/opencl/runtime/Dockerfile | 18 ++++++++++++++++++
 4 files changed, 48 insertions(+)

diff --git a/mk/opencl.mk b/mk/opencl.mk
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..31f3738
--- /dev/null
+++ b/mk/opencl.mk
@@ -0,0 +1,20 @@
+# Copyright (c) 2016, NVIDIA CORPORATION. All rights reserved.
+
+NV_DOCKER ?= docker
+
+# Building Docker images in parallel will duplicate identical layers.
+.NOTPARALLEL:
+.PHONY: all latest devel runtime
+
+all: latest devel runtime
+
+#################### OpenCL ####################
+
+latest: devel
+	$(NV_DOCKER) tag opencl:$< opencl
+
+devel: $(CURDIR)/devel/Dockerfile
+	$(NV_DOCKER) build -t opencl:$@ $(CURDIR)/devel
+
+runtime: $(CURDIR)/runtime/Dockerfile
+	$(NV_DOCKER) build -t opencl:$@ $(CURDIR)/runtime
diff --git a/ubuntu-14.04/opencl/Makefile b/ubuntu-14.04/opencl/Makefile
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..b065ae3
--- /dev/null
+++ b/ubuntu-14.04/opencl/Makefile
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+# Copyright (c) 2016, NVIDIA CORPORATION. All rights reserved.
+
+include ../../mk/opencl.mk
diff --git a/ubuntu-14.04/opencl/devel/Dockerfile b/ubuntu-14.04/opencl/devel/Dockerfile
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..9088dd7
--- /dev/null
+++ b/ubuntu-14.04/opencl/devel/Dockerfile
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+FROM opencl:runtime
+MAINTAINER NVIDIA CORPORATION <digits@nvidia.com>
+
+RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends --force-yes \
+        clinfo \
+        ocl-icd-opencl-dev && \
+    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
diff --git a/ubuntu-14.04/opencl/runtime/Dockerfile b/ubuntu-14.04/opencl/runtime/Dockerfile
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..ac7b9a9
--- /dev/null
+++ b/ubuntu-14.04/opencl/runtime/Dockerfile
@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+FROM ubuntu:14.04
+MAINTAINER NVIDIA CORPORATION <digits@nvidia.com>
+
+LABEL com.nvidia.volumes.needed="nvidia_driver"
+
+RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends --force-yes \
+        ocl-icd-libopencl1 \
+        clinfo && \
+    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
+
+RUN mkdir -p /etc/OpenCL/vendors && \
+    echo "libnvidia-opencl.so.1" > /etc/OpenCL/vendors/nvidia.icd
+
+RUN echo "/usr/local/nvidia/lib" >> /etc/ld.so.conf.d/nvidia.conf && \
+    echo "/usr/local/nvidia/lib64" >> /etc/ld.so.conf.d/nvidia.conf
+
+ENV PATH /usr/local/nvidia/bin:${PATH}
+ENV LD_LIBRARY_PATH /usr/local/nvidia/lib:/usr/local/nvidia/lib64:${LD_LIBRARY_PATH}

author: Jonathan Calmels
message: Change the plugin usage with version information
patch:
commit 7ea37c2661d92aceb86d0ca1d6dde74220b8405c
Author: Jonathan Calmels <jcalmels@nvidia.com>
Date:   Thu May 26 13:19:29 2016 -0700

    Change the plugin usage with version information
    
    Closes: #90
---
 tools/src/nvidia-docker-plugin/main.go | 19 ++++++++++++++-----
 1 file changed, 14 insertions(+), 5 deletions(-)

diff --git a/tools/src/nvidia-docker-plugin/main.go b/tools/src/nvidia-docker-plugin/main.go
index f7bb6db..006b6f9 100644
--- a/tools/src/nvidia-docker-plugin/main.go
+++ b/tools/src/nvidia-docker-plugin/main.go
@@ -4,6 +4,7 @@ package main
 
 import (
 	"flag"
+	"fmt"
 	"log"
 	"os"
 	"runtime"
@@ -13,10 +14,12 @@ import (
 )
 
 var (
-	ListenAddr  string
-	VolumesPath string
-	SocketPath  string
+	PrintVersion bool
+	ListenAddr   string
+	VolumesPath  string
+	SocketPath   string
 
+	Version string
 	Devices []nvidia.Device
 	Volumes nvidia.VolumeMap
 )
@@ -24,9 +27,10 @@ var (
 func init() {
 	log.SetPrefix(os.Args[0] + " | ")
 
+	flag.BoolVar(&PrintVersion, "v", false, "Show the plugin version information")
 	flag.StringVar(&ListenAddr, "l", "localhost:3476", "Server listen address")
-	flag.StringVar(&VolumesPath, "v", "/var/lib/nvidia-docker/volumes", "Path where to store the volumes")
-	flag.StringVar(&SocketPath, "s", "/run/docker/plugins", "NVIDIA plugin socket path")
+	flag.StringVar(&VolumesPath, "d", "/var/lib/nvidia-docker/volumes", "Path where to store the volumes")
+	flag.StringVar(&SocketPath, "s", "/run/docker/plugins", "Path to the plugin socket")
 }
 
 func assert(err error) {
@@ -54,6 +58,11 @@ func main() {
 	flag.Parse()
 	defer exit()
 
+	if PrintVersion {
+		fmt.Printf("NVIDIA Docker plugin: %s\n", Version)
+		return
+	}
+
 	log.Println("Loading NVIDIA unified memory")
 	assert(nvidia.LoadUVM())

+FROM cuda:8.0-runtime
+MAINTAINER NVIDIA CORPORATION <digits@nvidia.com>
+
+RUN curl -o cuda-repo.deb -fsSL http://developer.download.nvidia.com/compute/cuda/8.0/direct/cuda-repo-ubuntu1604-8-0-rc_8.0.27-1_amd64.deb && \
+    dpkg -i cuda-repo.deb && \
+    rm cuda-repo.deb && \
+    apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
+        cuda-core-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-misc-headers-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-command-line-tools-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-nvrtc-dev-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-nvml-dev-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-nvgraph-dev-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-cusolver-dev-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-cublas-dev-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-cufft-dev-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-curand-dev-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-cusparse-dev-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-npp-dev-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-cudart-dev-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-driver-dev-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION && \
+    apt-get remove --purge -y cuda-repo-ubuntu1604-8-0-rc && \
+    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

new file mode 100644
index 0000000..cc175e1
--- /dev/null
+++ b/ubuntu-16.04/cuda/8.0/devel/cudnn5/Dockerfile
@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+FROM cuda:8.0-devel
+MAINTAINER NVIDIA CORPORATION <digits@nvidia.com>
+
+ENV CUDNN_VERSION 5
+LABEL com.nvidia.cudnn.version="5"
+
+ENV CUDNN_DOWNLOAD_SUM af80eb1ce0cb51e6a734b2bdc599e6d50b676eab3921e5bddfe5443485df86b6
+
+RUN curl -fsSL http://developer.download.nvidia.com/compute/redist/cudnn/v5/cudnn-8.0-linux-x64-v5.0-ga.tgz -O && \
+    echo "$CUDNN_DOWNLOAD_SUM  cudnn-8.0-linux-x64-v5.0-ga.tgz" | sha256sum -c --strict - && \
+    tar -xzf cudnn-8.0-linux-x64-v5.0-ga.tgz -C /usr/local && \
+    rm cudnn-8.0-linux-x64-v5.0-ga.tgz && \
+    ldconfig
diff --git a/ubuntu-16.04/cuda/8.0/runtime/Dockerfile b/ubuntu-16.04/cuda/8.0/runtime/Dockerfile
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..4b7a8db
--- /dev/null
+++ b/ubuntu-16.04/cuda/8.0/runtime/Dockerfile
@@ -0,0 +1,40 @@
+FROM ubuntu:16.04
+MAINTAINER NVIDIA CORPORATION <digits@nvidia.com>
+
+LABEL com.nvidia.volumes.needed="nvidia_driver"
+
+RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
+        ca-certificates \
+        curl && \
+    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
+
+ENV CUDA_VERSION 8.0
+LABEL com.nvidia.cuda.version="8.0"
+
+ENV CUDA_PKG_VERSION 8-0=8.0.27-1
+RUN curl -o cuda-repo.deb -fsSL http://developer.download.nvidia.com/compute/cuda/8.0/direct/cuda-repo-ubuntu1604-8-0-rc_8.0.27-1_amd64.deb && \
+    dpkg -i cuda-repo.deb && \
+    rm cuda-repo.deb && \
+    apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
+        cuda-nvrtc-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-nvgraph-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-cusolver-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-cublas-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-cufft-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-curand-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-cusparse-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-npp-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION \
+        cuda-cudart-$CUDA_PKG_VERSION && \
+    ln -s cuda-$CUDA_VERSION /usr/local/cuda && \
+    apt-get remove --purge -y cuda-repo-ubuntu1604-8-0-rc && \
+    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
+
+RUN echo "/usr/local/cuda/lib" >> /etc/ld.so.conf.d/cuda.conf && \
+    echo "/usr/local/cuda/lib64" >> /etc/ld.so.conf.d/cuda.conf && \
+    ldconfig
+
+RUN echo "/usr/local/nvidia/lib" >> /etc/ld.so.conf.d/nvidia.conf && \
+    echo "/usr/local/nvidia/lib64" >> /etc/ld.so.conf.d/nvidia.conf
+
+ENV PATH /usr/local/nvidia/bin:/usr/local/cuda/bin:${PATH}
+ENV LD_LIBRARY_PATH /usr/local/nvidia/lib:/usr/local/nvidia/lib64:${LD_LIBRARY_PATH}
diff --git a/ubuntu-16.04/cuda/8.0/runtime/cudnn b/ubuntu-16.04/cuda/8.0/runtime/cudnn
new file mode 120000

+MAINTAINER NVIDIA CORPORATION <digits@nvidia.com>
+
+ENV CUDNN_VERSION 5
+LABEL com.nvidia.cudnn.version="5"
+
+ENV CUDNN_DOWNLOAD_SUM af80eb1ce0cb51e6a734b2bdc599e6d50b676eab3921e5bddfe5443485df86b6
+
+RUN curl -fsSL http://developer.download.nvidia.com/compute/redist/cudnn/v5/cudnn-8.0-linux-x64-v5.0-ga.tgz -O && \
+    echo "$CUDNN_DOWNLOAD_SUM  cudnn-8.0-linux-x64-v5.0-ga.tgz" | sha256sum -c --strict - && \
+    tar -xzf cudnn-8.0-linux-x64-v5.0-ga.tgz -C /usr/local --wildcards 'cuda/lib64/libcudnn.so.*' && \
+    rm cudnn-8.0-linux-x64-v5.0-ga.tgz && \

+CUDNN_VERSIONS := 8.0-cudnn5
+
+include ../../mk/cuda.mk

author: Felix Abecassis
message: Add support for the Pascal architecture
patch:
commit 920b69de26da835e716997df11554417c46c3f19
Author: Felix Abecassis <fabecassis@nvidia.com>
Date:   Thu May 26 22:21:23 2016 -0700

    Add support for the Pascal architecture
---
 tools/src/cuda/cuda.go | 4 ++++
 1 file changed, 4 insertions(+)

diff --git a/tools/src/cuda/cuda.go b/tools/src/cuda/cuda.go
index adb2deb..52aae2f 100644
--- a/tools/src/cuda/cuda.go
+++ b/tools/src/cuda/cuda.go
@@ -30,6 +30,7 @@ func archFamily(arch string) *string {
 		"2": "Fermi",
 		"3": "Kepler",
 		"5": "Maxwell",
+		"6": "Pascal",
 	}
 
 	f, ok := m[arch[:1]]
@@ -54,6 +55,9 @@ func archSMCores(arch string) *uint {
 		"5.0": 128, // Maxwell Generation (SM 5.0) GM10x class
 		"5.2": 128, // Maxwell Generation (SM 5.2) GM20x class
 		"5.3": 128, // Maxwell Generation (SM 5.3) TX1 class
+		"6.0": 64,  // Pascal Generation (SM 6.0) GP100 class
+		"6.1": 128, // Pascal Generation (SM 6.1) GP10x class
+		"6.2": 128, // Pascal Generation (SM 6.2) GP10x class
 	}
 
 	c, ok := m[arch]

author: Felix Abecassis
patch:
commit 8e6ec6430ae51dea719a2776159d64f88e758619
Author: Felix Abecassis <fabecassis@nvidia.com>
Date:   Wed May 18 16:48:37 2016 -0700

    Add missing dependencies for DIGITS
---
 ubuntu-14.04/digits/Dockerfile | 3 +++
 1 file changed, 3 insertions(+)

diff --git a/ubuntu-14.04/digits/Dockerfile b/ubuntu-14.04/digits/Dockerfile
index e1c889a..1d0bcce 100644
--- a/ubuntu-14.04/digits/Dockerfile
+++ b/ubuntu-14.04/digits/Dockerfile
@@ -5,9 +5,12 @@ ENV DIGITS_VERSION 3.0
 LABEL com.nvidia.digits.version="3.0"
 
 ENV DIGITS_PKG_VERSION 3.0.0-1
+# workaround: gcc and libhdf5-dev are dependencies that are currently missing from the torch package
 RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends --force-yes \
             torch7-nv=0.9.98-1+cuda7.5 \
             graphviz \
+            gcc \
+            libhdf5-dev \
             digits=$DIGITS_PKG_VERSION && \
     rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

author: Felix Abecassis

author: Felix Abecassis
patch:
commit 9bb9af4be07034c468ba4c4adc047a9f4df89975
Author: Felix Abecassis <fabecassis@nvidia.com>
Date:   Tue May 17 18:31:50 2016 -0700

    Update the caffe Dockerfile
---
 mk/caffe.mk                   | 2 +-
 ubuntu-14.04/caffe/Dockerfile | 4 ++--
 2 files changed, 3 insertions(+), 3 deletions(-)

diff --git a/mk/caffe.mk b/mk/caffe.mk
index 2964eb9..4b981a2 100644
--- a/mk/caffe.mk
+++ b/mk/caffe.mk
@@ -11,5 +11,5 @@ all: latest
 #################### NVIDIA Caffe ####################
 
 latest: $(CURDIR)/Dockerfile
-	make -C $(CURDIR)/../cuda 7.0-cudnn4-runtime
+	make -C $(CURDIR)/../cuda 7.5-cudnn5-runtime

-FROM cuda:7.0-cudnn4-runtime

 MAINTAINER NVIDIA CORPORATION <digits@nvidia.com>

-ENV CAFFE_PKG_VERSION 0.14.2-1

author: Felix Abecassis
patch:
commit 92394af02c30bb13687d78c3a2db52c9427481e0
Author: Felix Abecassis <fabecassis@nvidia.com>
Date:   Tue May 17 18:31:45 2016 -0700

    Add cuDNN v5 for CentOS 7
---
 centos-7/cuda/7.5/devel/cudnn               |  1 +
 centos-7/cuda/7.5/devel/cudnn5/Dockerfile   | 12 ++++++++++++
 centos-7/cuda/7.5/runtime/cudnn             |  1 +
 centos-7/cuda/7.5/runtime/cudnn5/Dockerfile | 12 ++++++++++++
 centos-7/cuda/Makefile                      |  3 ++-
 5 files changed, 28 insertions(+), 1 deletion(-)

diff --git a/centos-7/cuda/7.5/devel/cudnn b/centos-7/cuda/7.5/devel/cudnn
new file mode 120000
index 0000000..a738859
--- /dev/null
+++ b/centos-7/cuda/7.5/devel/cudnn
@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+cudnn5
\ No newline at end of file
diff --git a/centos-7/cuda/7.5/devel/cudnn5/Dockerfile b/centos-7/cuda/7.5/devel/cudnn5/Dockerfile
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..570054d
--- /dev/null
+++ b/centos-7/cuda/7.5/devel/cudnn5/Dockerfile
@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+FROM cuda:7.5-devel
+
+ENV CUDNN_VERSION 5
+LABEL com.nvidia.cudnn.version="5"
+
+ENV CUDNN_DOWNLOAD_SUM c4739a00608c3b66a004a74fc8e721848f9112c5cb15f730c1be4964b3a23b3a
+
+RUN curl -fsSL http://developer.download.nvidia.com/compute/redist/cudnn/v5/cudnn-7.5-linux-x64-v5.0-ga.tgz -O && \
+    echo "$CUDNN_DOWNLOAD_SUM  cudnn-7.5-linux-x64-v5.0-ga.tgz" | sha256sum -c --strict - && \
+    tar -xzf cudnn-7.5-linux-x64-v5.0-ga.tgz -C /usr/local && \
+    rm cudnn-7.5-linux-x64-v5.0-ga.tgz && \
+    ldconfig
diff --git a/centos-7/cuda/7.5/runtime/cudnn b/centos-7/cuda/7.5/runtime/cudnn
new file mode 120000
index 0000000..a738859
--- /dev/null
+++ b/centos-7/cuda/7.5/runtime/cudnn
@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+cudnn5
\ No newline at end of file
diff --git a/centos-7/cuda/7.5/runtime/cudnn5/Dockerfile b/centos-7/cuda/7.5/runtime/cudnn5/Dockerfile
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..4259577
--- /dev/null
+++ b/centos-7/cuda/7.5/runtime/cudnn5/Dockerfile
@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+FROM cuda:7.5-runtime
+
+ENV CUDNN_VERSION 5
+LABEL com.nvidia.cudnn.version="5"
+
+ENV CUDNN_DOWNLOAD_SUM c4739a00608c3b66a004a74fc8e721848f9112c5cb15f730c1be4964b3a23b3a
+
+RUN curl -fsSL http://developer.download.nvidia.com/compute/redist/cudnn/v5/cudnn-7.5-linux-x64-v5.0-ga.tgz -O && \
+    echo "$CUDNN_DOWNLOAD_SUM  cudnn-7.5-linux-x64-v5.0-ga.tgz" | sha256sum -c --strict - && \
+    tar -xzf cudnn-7.5-linux-x64-v5.0-ga.tgz -C /usr/local --wildcards 'cuda/lib64/libcudnn.so.*' && \
+    rm cudnn-7.5-linux-x64-v5.0-ga.tgz && \
+    ldconfig
diff --git a/centos-7/cuda/Makefile b/centos-7/cuda/Makefile
index 7ac6b9a..5f932b1 100644
--- a/centos-7/cuda/Makefile
+++ b/centos-7/cuda/Makefile
@@ -3,7 +3,8 @@
 CUDA_VERSIONS := 7.5 \
                  7.0
 
-CUDNN_VERSIONS := 7.5-cudnn4 \
+CUDNN_VERSIONS := 7.5-cudnn5 \
+                  7.5-cudnn4 \
                   7.0-cudnn4
 
 include ../../mk/cuda.mk

author: Felix Abecassis
patch:
commit afeaa6fe5ca30168d6e08dcf541f750cd87a2143
Author: Felix Abecassis <fabecassis@nvidia.com>
Date:   Fri May 13 11:16:22 2016 -0700

    Add cuDNN v5 for Ubuntu 14.04
    
    Closes: #72
---
 mk/cuda.mk                                      |  6 ++++++
 ubuntu-14.04/cuda/7.5/devel/cudnn               |  2 +-
 ubuntu-14.04/cuda/7.5/devel/cudnn5/Dockerfile   | 11 +++++++++++
 ubuntu-14.04/cuda/7.5/runtime/cudnn             |  2 +-
 ubuntu-14.04/cuda/7.5/runtime/cudnn5/Dockerfile | 11 +++++++++++
 ubuntu-14.04/cuda/Makefile                      |  3 ++-
 6 files changed, 32 insertions(+), 3 deletions(-)

diff --git a/mk/cuda.mk b/mk/cuda.mk
index 09fef59..552ea93 100644
--- a/mk/cuda.mk
+++ b/mk/cuda.mk
@@ -71,3 +71,9 @@ cudnn-runtime: $(CUDNN_LATEST)-runtime
 
 %-cudnn4-runtime: %-runtime $(CURDIR)/%/runtime/cudnn4/Dockerfile
 	$(NV_DOCKER) build -t cuda:$@ $(CURDIR)/$*/runtime/cudnn4
+
+%-cudnn5-devel: %-devel $(CURDIR)/%/devel/cudnn5/Dockerfile
+	$(NV_DOCKER) build -t cuda:$@ $(CURDIR)/$*/devel/cudnn5
+
+%-cudnn5-runtime: %-runtime $(CURDIR)/%/runtime/cudnn5/Dockerfile
+	$(NV_DOCKER) build -t cuda:$@ $(CURDIR)/$*/runtime/cudnn5
diff --git a/ubuntu-14.04/cuda/7.5/devel/cudnn b/ubuntu-14.04/cuda/7.5/devel/cudnn
index 5ff11ee..a738859 120000
--- a/ubuntu-14.04/cuda/7.5/devel/cudnn
+++ b/ubuntu-14.04/cuda/7.5/devel/cudnn
@@ -1 +1 @@
-cudnn4
\ No newline at end of file
+cudnn5
\ No newline at end of file
diff --git a/ubuntu-14.04/cuda/7.5/devel/cudnn5/Dockerfile b/ubuntu-14.04/cuda/7.5/devel/cudnn5/Dockerfile
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..7282c94
--- /dev/null
+++ b/ubuntu-14.04/cuda/7.5/devel/cudnn5/Dockerfile
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+FROM cuda:7.5-devel
+MAINTAINER NVIDIA CORPORATION <digits@nvidia.com>
+
+RUN echo "deb http://developer.download.nvidia.com/compute/machine-learning/repos/ubuntu1404/x86_64 /" > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/nvidia-ml.list
+
+ENV CUDNN_VERSION 5
+LABEL com.nvidia.cudnn.version="5"
+
+RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends --force-yes \
+            libcudnn5-dev=5.0.5-1+cuda7.5 && \
+    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
diff --git a/ubuntu-14.04/cuda/7.5/runtime/cudnn b/ubuntu-14.04/cuda/7.5/runtime/cudnn
index 5ff11ee..a738859 120000
--- a/ubuntu-14.04/cuda/7.5/runtime/cudnn
+++ b/ubuntu-14.04/cuda/7.5/runtime/cudnn
@@ -1 +1 @@
-cudnn4
\ No newline at end of file
+cudnn5
\ No newline at end of file
diff --git a/ubuntu-14.04/cuda/7.5/runtime/cudnn5/Dockerfile b/ubuntu-14.04/cuda/7.5/runtime/cudnn5/Dockerfile
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..5b4f37a
--- /dev/null
+++ b/ubuntu-14.04/cuda/7.5/runtime/cudnn5/Dockerfile
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+FROM cuda:7.5-runtime
+MAINTAINER NVIDIA CORPORATION <digits@nvidia.com>
+
+RUN echo "deb http://developer.download.nvidia.com/compute/machine-learning/repos/ubuntu1404/x86_64 /" > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/nvidia-ml.list
+
+ENV CUDNN_VERSION 5
+LABEL com.nvidia.cudnn.version="5"
+
+RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends --force-yes \
+            libcudnn5=5.0.5-1+cuda7.5 && \
+    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
diff --git a/ubuntu-14.04/cuda/Makefile b/ubuntu-14.04/cuda/Makefile
index 3ac8ac8..e3bf111 100644
--- a/ubuntu-14.04/cuda/Makefile
+++ b/ubuntu-14.04/cuda/Makefile
@@ -4,7 +4,8 @@ CUDA_VERSIONS := 7.5 \
                  7.0 \
                  6.5
 
-CUDNN_VERSIONS := 7.5-cudnn4 \
+CUDNN_VERSIONS := 7.5-cudnn5 \
+                  7.5-cudnn4 \
                   7.5-cudnn3 \
                   7.0-cudnn4 \
                   7.0-cudnn3 \

author: Jonathan Calmels
patch:
commit 121f51bb76c7872c4ea8d9cd0a682cb788bcf0a6
Author: Jonathan Calmels <jcalmels@nvidia.com>
Date:   Tue May 3 18:12:09 2016 -0700

    Update changelog for 1.0.0~rc
---
 README.md                   | 12 ++++++------
 tools/Makefile              |  2 +-
 tools/conf/debian/changelog | 14 ++++++++++++++
 3 files changed, 21 insertions(+), 7 deletions(-)

diff --git a/README.md b/README.md
index 1e36902..2c0d7e0 100644
--- a/README.md
+++ b/README.md
@@ -20,8 +20,8 @@ Assuming the NVIDIA drivers and Docker are properly installed (see [installation
 ##### _Ubuntu distributions_
 ```sh
 # Install nvidia-docker and nvidia-docker-plugin
-wget -P /tmp https://github.com/NVIDIA/nvidia-docker/releases/download/v1.0.0-beta.3/nvidia-docker_1.0.0.beta.3-1_amd64.deb
-sudo dpkg -i /tmp/nvidia-docker_1.0.0.beta.3-1_amd64.deb && rm /tmp/nvidia-docker*.deb
+wget -P /tmp https://github.com/NVIDIA/nvidia-docker/releases/download/v1.0.0-rc/nvidia-docker_1.0.0.rc-1_amd64.deb
+sudo dpkg -i /tmp/nvidia-docker_1.0.0.rc-1_amd64.deb && rm /tmp/nvidia-docker*.deb
 
 # Test nvidia-smi
 nvidia-docker run --rm nvidia/cuda nvidia-smi
@@ -30,8 +30,8 @@ nvidia-docker run --rm nvidia/cuda nvidia-smi
 ##### _Other distributions_
 ```sh
 # Install nvidia-docker and nvidia-docker-plugin
-wget -P /tmp https://github.com/NVIDIA/nvidia-docker/releases/download/v1.0.0-beta.3/nvidia-docker_1.0.0.beta.3_amd64.tar.xz
-sudo tar --strip-components=1 -C /usr/bin -xvf /tmp/nvidia-docker_1.0.0.beta.3_amd64.tar.xz && rm /tmp/nvidia-docker*.tar.xz
+wget -P /tmp https://github.com/NVIDIA/nvidia-docker/releases/download/v1.0.0-rc/nvidia-docker_1.0.0.rc_amd64.tar.xz
+sudo tar --strip-components=1 -C /usr/bin -xvf /tmp/nvidia-docker_1.0.0.rc_amd64.tar.xz && rm /tmp/nvidia-docker*.tar.xz
 
 # Run nvidia-docker-plugin
 sudo -b nohup nvidia-docker-plugin > /tmp/nvidia-docker.log
@@ -43,8 +43,8 @@ nvidia-docker run --rm nvidia/cuda nvidia-smi
 ### Standalone install
 ```sh
 # Install nvidia-docker and nvidia-docker-plugin
-wget -P /tmp https://github.com/NVIDIA/nvidia-docker/releases/download/v1.0.0-beta.3/nvidia-docker_1.0.0.beta.3_amd64.tar.xz
-sudo tar --strip-components=1 -C /usr/bin -xvf /tmp/nvidia-docker_1.0.0~beta.3_amd64.tar.xz && rm /tmp/nvidia-docker*.tar.xz
+wget -P /tmp https://github.com/NVIDIA/nvidia-docker/releases/download/v1.0.0-rc/nvidia-docker_1.0.0.rc_amd64.tar.xz
+sudo tar --strip-components=1 -C /usr/bin -xvf /tmp/nvidia-docker_1.0.0.rc_amd64.tar.xz && rm /tmp/nvidia-docker*.tar.xz
 
 # One-time setup
 sudo nvidia-docker volume setup
diff --git a/tools/Makefile b/tools/Makefile
index ed5487e..5964392 100644
--- a/tools/Makefile
+++ b/tools/Makefile
@@ -16,7 +16,7 @@ DOCKER_BIN := $(BIN_DIR)/nvidia-docker
 PLUGIN_BIN := $(BIN_DIR)/nvidia-docker-plugin
 
 PKG_NAME := nvidia-docker
-PKG_VERS := 1.0.0~beta.3
+PKG_VERS := 1.0.0~rc
 PKG_REV  := 1
 PKG_ARCH := amd64
 PKG_DIR  := $(DIST_DIR)/$(PKG_NAME)-$(PKG_VERS)
diff --git a/tools/conf/debian/changelog b/tools/conf/debian/changelog
index 44fb59b..47684bf 100644
--- a/tools/conf/debian/changelog
+++ b/tools/conf/debian/changelog
@@ -1,3 +1,17 @@
+nvidia-docker (1.0.0~rc-1) trusty; urgency=low
+
+  * Add /docker/cli/json RestAPI endpoint (Closes: #39, #91)
+  * Fix support for Docker 1.9 (Closes: #83)
+  * Handle gracefully devices unsupported by NVML (Closes: #40)
+  * Improve error reporting
+  * Support for Docker 1.11 (Closes: #89, #84, #77, #73)
+  * Add NVIDIA Docker version output
+  * Improve init scripts and add support for systemd
+  * Query CPU affinity through sysfs instead of NVML (Closes: #65)
+  * Load UVM before anything else
+
+ -- NVIDIA CORPORATION <digits@nvidia.com>  Tue, 03 May 2016 17:44:36 -0700
+
 nvidia-docker (1.0.0~beta.3-1) trusty; urgency=low
 
   * Remove driver hard dependency (NVML)

author: Jonathan Calmels
message: Remove deprecated option -f when tagging images
patch:
commit cf41c7bf9936fd5b47c643a3fe6587e91fdd09a2
Author: Jonathan Calmels <jcalmels@nvidia.com>
Date:   Tue May 3 13:45:33 2016 -0700

    Remove deprecated option -f when tagging images
---
 Makefile   |  4 ++--
 mk/cuda.mk | 18 +++++++++---------
 2 files changed, 11 insertions(+), 11 deletions(-)

diff --git a/Makefile b/Makefile
index a807dbd..d078fd7 100644
--- a/Makefile
+++ b/Makefile
@@ -53,7 +53,7 @@ clean-images:
 
 # Tag all images with the Docker Hub username as a prefix, push them and untag everything.
 dockerhub_push = \
-$(NV_DOCKER) images | awk '$$1 == "$(1)" {print $$1":"$$2}' | xargs -I{} $(NV_DOCKER) tag -f {} $(USERNAME)/{}$(PUSH_SUFFIX) && \
+$(NV_DOCKER) images | awk '$$1 == "$(1)" {print $$1":"$$2}' | xargs -I{} $(NV_DOCKER) tag {} $(USERNAME)/{}$(PUSH_SUFFIX) && \
 ($(NV_DOCKER) push $(USERNAME)/$(1) || true) && \
 $(NV_DOCKER) images | awk '$$1 == "$(USERNAME)/$(1)" {print $$1":"$$2}' | xargs -r $(NV_DOCKER) rmi
 
@@ -61,7 +61,7 @@ $(NV_DOCKER) images | awk '$$1 == "$(USERNAME)/$(1)" {print $$1":"$$2}' | xargs
 dockerhub_pull = \
 $(NV_DOCKER) pull --all-tags $(USERNAME)/$(1) && \
 $(NV_DOCKER) images | awk '$$1 == "$(USERNAME)/$(1)" {print $$2}' | \
-  xargs -I{} sh -c '$(NV_DOCKER) tag -f $(USERNAME)/$(1):{} $(1):{} ; $(NV_DOCKER) rmi $(USERNAME)/$(1):{}'
+  xargs -I{} sh -c '$(NV_DOCKER) tag $(USERNAME)/$(1):{} $(1):{} ; $(NV_DOCKER) rmi $(USERNAME)/$(1):{}'
 
 push:
 	$(call dockerhub_push,cuda)

+	$(NV_DOCKER) tag cuda:$< cuda

+	$(NV_DOCKER) tag cuda:$< cuda:$@
 
 7.5: 7.5-devel $(CURDIR)/7.5

 7.0: 7.0-devel $(CURDIR)/7.0

 6.5: 6.5-devel $(CURDIR)/6.5

+	$(NV_DOCKER) tag cuda:$< cuda:$@
 
 %-devel: %-runtime $(CURDIR)/%/devel/Dockerfile

author: Jonathan Calmels
patch:
commit f07d2b97a0de3901c1d72a90837f66a321af22ed
Author: Jonathan Calmels <jcalmels@nvidia.com>
Date:   Mon May 2 17:36:08 2016 -0700

    Default install prefix to /usr/local
    
    Fixes: #86
---
 tools/Makefile                           | 20 +++++++++++---------
 tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.install  |  2 +-
 tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.postinst |  2 +-
 tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.service  |  2 +-
 tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.upstart  |  2 +-
 tools/conf/debian/rules                  |  9 ---------
 6 files changed, 15 insertions(+), 22 deletions(-)

diff --git a/tools/Makefile b/tools/Makefile
index 151b4ac..ed5487e 100644
--- a/tools/Makefile
+++ b/tools/Makefile
@@ -1,15 +1,17 @@
 # Copyright (c) 2015-2016, NVIDIA CORPORATION. All rights reserved.
 
 NV_DOCKER ?= docker
-PREFIX    ?= /usr/bin
 
-BIN_DIR  := $(CURDIR)/bin
-CONF_DIR := $(CURDIR)/conf
-DIST_DIR := $(CURDIR)/dist
+prefix      ?= /usr/local
+exec_prefix ?= $(prefix)
+bindir      ?= $(exec_prefix)/bin
 
 BUILD_IMAGE := nvdocker-build
 USER_ID     := $(shell id -u)
 
+BIN_DIR    := $(CURDIR)/bin
+CONF_DIR   := $(CURDIR)/conf
+DIST_DIR   := $(CURDIR)/dist
 DOCKER_BIN := $(BIN_DIR)/nvidia-docker
 PLUGIN_BIN := $(BIN_DIR)/nvidia-docker-plugin
 
@@ -38,12 +40,12 @@ endif
 	@$(NV_DOCKER) run --rm --net=host -e VERSION=$(PKG_VERS) -v $(BIN_DIR):/go/bin $(BUILD_IMAGE)
 
 install: all
-	install -D -T -m 755 $(DOCKER_BIN) $(PREFIX)/$(notdir $(DOCKER_BIN))
-	install -D -T -m 755 $(PLUGIN_BIN) $(PREFIX)/$(notdir $(PLUGIN_BIN))
+	install -D -T -m 755 $(DOCKER_BIN) $(bindir)/$(notdir $(DOCKER_BIN))
+	install -D -T -m 755 $(PLUGIN_BIN) $(bindir)/$(notdir $(PLUGIN_BIN))
 
 uninstall:
-	$(RM) $(PREFIX)/$(notdir $(DOCKER_BIN))
-	$(RM) $(PREFIX)/$(notdir $(PLUGIN_BIN))
+	$(RM) $(bindir)/$(notdir $(DOCKER_BIN))
+	$(RM) $(bindir)/$(notdir $(PLUGIN_BIN))
 
 clean:
 	-@$(NV_DOCKER) rmi -f $(BUILD_IMAGE) golang 2> /dev/null
@@ -66,5 +68,5 @@ deb: build distclean
 	@-read -p "Update changelog? " yn; [ "$$yn" = "y" ] && \
 	dch -c $(CONF_DIR)/debian/changelog -v $(PKG_VERS)-$(PKG_REV) --no-auto-nmu
 	cd $(PKG_DIR) && dh_make -y -s -c bsd -d -t $(CONF_DIR)/debian --createorig
-	cd $(PKG_DIR) && debuild -e PREFIX=$(PREFIX) -i -us -uc -b
+	cd $(PKG_DIR) && debuild -i -us -uc -b
 	@printf "\nFind packages at $(DIST_DIR)\n\n"
diff --git a/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.install b/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.install
index 3afae4e..e82dac3 100644
--- a/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.install
+++ b/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.install
@@ -1 +1 @@
-bin/* #PREFIX#
+bin/* /usr/bin
diff --git a/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.postinst b/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.postinst
index 393feba..57575f7 100644
--- a/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.postinst
+++ b/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.postinst
@@ -4,7 +4,7 @@ set -e
 
 NVIDIA_DOCKER_USER=#PACKAGE#
 NVIDIA_DOCKER_ROOT=/var/lib/nvidia-docker
-NVIDIA_DOCKER_PLUGIN=#PREFIX#/nvidia-docker-plugin
+NVIDIA_DOCKER_PLUGIN=/usr/bin/nvidia-docker-plugin
 
 case "$1" in
     configure)
diff --git a/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.service b/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.service
index 4afdf26..ab4fd9b 100644
--- a/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.service
+++ b/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.service
@@ -16,7 +16,7 @@ RestartSec=1
 TimeoutStartSec=0
 TimeoutStopSec=20
 
-ExecStart=#PREFIX#/nvidia-docker-plugin -s $SOCK_DIR
+ExecStart=/usr/bin/nvidia-docker-plugin -s $SOCK_DIR
 ExecStartPost=/bin/sh -c '/bin/mkdir -p $( dirname $SPEC_FILE )'
 ExecStartPost=/bin/sh -c '/bin/echo $SOCK_FILE > $SPEC_FILE'
 ExecStopPost=/bin/rm -f $SPEC_FILE
diff --git a/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.upstart b/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.upstart
index 17e8cec..58a081a 100644
--- a/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.upstart
+++ b/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.upstart
@@ -10,7 +10,7 @@ respawn limit 5 10
 kill timeout 20
 
 env NVIDIA_DOCKER_USER=#PACKAGE#
-env NVIDIA_DOCKER_PLUGIN=#PREFIX#/nvidia-docker-plugin
+env NVIDIA_DOCKER_PLUGIN=/usr/bin/nvidia-docker-plugin
 env NVIDIA_DOCKER_PLUGIN_SPEC=/etc/docker/plugins/nvidia-docker.spec
 
 script
diff --git a/tools/conf/debian/rules b/tools/conf/debian/rules
index 7c77019..8bf93a2 100755
--- a/tools/conf/debian/rules
+++ b/tools/conf/debian/rules
@@ -3,17 +3,8 @@
 
 #export DH_VERBOSE=1
 
-fill = find debian -regex 'debian/#PACKAGE#\.\w+' -type f | \
-       xargs sed -i 's;\#$(1)\#;$(2);g'
-
 override_dh_shlibdeps:
 	dh_shlibdeps --dpkg-shlibdeps-params=--ignore-missing-info
 
-override_dh_prep: fill_templates
-	dh_prep
-
-fill_templates:
-	$(call fill,PREFIX,$(PREFIX))
-
 %:
 	dh $@

author: Jonathan Calmels
Jonathan Calmels
Ke Edson
message: Add cuDNN v4 to CUDA 7.0 and 7.5 on CentOS 7
patch:
commit c5fe8e42329555b814ba4ac70d22f0a2b66bb129
Author: Ke Edson <sudo.edson@gmail.com>
Date:   Fri Apr 15 14:55:05 2016 -0700

    Add cuDNN v4 to CUDA 7.0 and 7.5 on CentOS 7
    
    Closes: #55
    
    Signed-off-by: Felix Abecassis <fabecassis@nvidia.com>
---
 centos-7/cuda/7.0/devel/cudnn4/Dockerfile   | 12 ++++++++++++
 centos-7/cuda/7.0/runtime/cudnn4/Dockerfile | 12 ++++++++++++
 centos-7/cuda/7.5/devel/cudnn4/Dockerfile   | 12 ++++++++++++
 centos-7/cuda/7.5/runtime/cudnn4/Dockerfile | 12 ++++++++++++
 centos-7/cuda/Makefile                      |  3 ++-
 5 files changed, 50 insertions(+), 1 deletion(-)

diff --git a/centos-7/cuda/7.0/devel/cudnn4/Dockerfile b/centos-7/cuda/7.0/devel/cudnn4/Dockerfile
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..0881d51
--- /dev/null
+++ b/centos-7/cuda/7.0/devel/cudnn4/Dockerfile
@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+FROM cuda:7.0-devel
+
+ENV CUDNN_VERSION 4
+LABEL com.nvidia.cudnn.version="4"
+
+ENV CUDNN_DOWNLOAD_SUM 4e64ef7716f20c87854b4421863328e17cce633330c319b5e13809b61a36f97d
+
+RUN curl -fsSL http://developer.download.nvidia.com/compute/redist/cudnn/v4/cudnn-7.0-linux-x64-v4.0-prod.tgz -O && \
+    echo "$CUDNN_DOWNLOAD_SUM  cudnn-7.0-linux-x64-v4.0-prod.tgz" | sha256sum -c --strict - && \
+    tar -xzf cudnn-7.0-linux-x64-v4.0-prod.tgz -C /usr/local && \
+    rm cudnn-7.0-linux-x64-v4.0-prod.tgz && \
+    ldconfig
diff --git a/centos-7/cuda/7.0/runtime/cudnn4/Dockerfile b/centos-7/cuda/7.0/runtime/cudnn4/Dockerfile
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..bca1f9b
--- /dev/null
+++ b/centos-7/cuda/7.0/runtime/cudnn4/Dockerfile
@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+FROM cuda:7.0-runtime
+
+ENV CUDNN_VERSION 4
+LABEL com.nvidia.cudnn.version="4"
+
+ENV CUDNN_DOWNLOAD_SUM 4e64ef7716f20c87854b4421863328e17cce633330c319b5e13809b61a36f97d
+
+RUN curl -fsSL http://developer.download.nvidia.com/compute/redist/cudnn/v4/cudnn-7.0-linux-x64-v4.0-prod.tgz -O && \
+    echo "$CUDNN_DOWNLOAD_SUM  cudnn-7.0-linux-x64-v4.0-prod.tgz" | sha256sum -c --strict - && \
+    tar -xzf cudnn-7.0-linux-x64-v4.0-prod.tgz -C /usr/local --wildcards 'cuda/lib64/libcudnn.so*' && \
+    rm cudnn-7.0-linux-x64-v4.0-prod.tgz && \

author: Jonathan Calmels
message: Fix careless debian pkg directory removal
patch:
commit b557f6bce015691bac26f5e55ec39310ce924e17
Author: Jonathan Calmels <jcalmels@nvidia.com>
Date:   Tue Apr 12 17:39:05 2016 -0700

    Fix careless debian pkg directory removal
---
 tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.dirs     |  1 +
 tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.postinst |  3 ++-
 tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.postrm   |  2 --
 tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.prerm    | 23 +++++++++++++++++++++++
 4 files changed, 26 insertions(+), 3 deletions(-)

diff --git a/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.dirs b/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.dirs
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..97b57fb
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.dirs
@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+/var/lib/nvidia-docker
diff --git a/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.postinst b/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.postinst
index d6d2dc6..393feba 100644
--- a/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.postinst
+++ b/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.postinst
@@ -8,7 +8,8 @@ NVIDIA_DOCKER_PLUGIN=#PREFIX#/nvidia-docker-plugin
 
 case "$1" in
     configure)
-        adduser --system --home "$NVIDIA_DOCKER_ROOT" "$NVIDIA_DOCKER_USER"
+        adduser --system --no-create-home --home "$NVIDIA_DOCKER_ROOT" "$NVIDIA_DOCKER_USER"
+        chown "$NVIDIA_DOCKER_USER": "$NVIDIA_DOCKER_ROOT"
         setcap cap_fowner+pe "$NVIDIA_DOCKER_PLUGIN"
     ;;
 
diff --git a/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.postrm b/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.postrm
index e2722af..377a9bc 100644
--- a/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.postrm
+++ b/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.postrm
@@ -3,12 +3,10 @@
 set -e
 
 NVIDIA_DOCKER_USER=#PACKAGE#
-NVIDIA_DOCKER_ROOT=/var/lib/nvidia-docker
 
 case "$1" in
     purge|remove|upgrade|failed-upgrade|abort-install|abort-upgrade|disappear)
         deluser --quiet --system "$NVIDIA_DOCKER_USER"
-        rm -rf "$NVIDIA_DOCKER_ROOT"
     ;;
 
     *)
diff --git a/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.prerm b/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.prerm
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..aff1bc8
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.prerm
@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+#!/bin/sh
+
+set -e
+
+NVIDIA_DOCKER_ROOT=/var/lib/nvidia-docker
+
+case "$1" in
+    remove|upgrade|deconfigure)
+        find "$NVIDIA_DOCKER_ROOT" -type d -empty -delete
+    ;;
+
+    failed-upgrade)
+    ;;
+
+    *)
+        echo "prerm called with unknown argument \`$1'" >&2
+        exit 1
+    ;;
+esac
+
+#DEBHELPER#
+
+exit 0

patch:

 kill timeout 20
 
+env NVIDIA_DOCKER_USER=#PACKAGE#

 script

     if [ -f /etc/default/$UPSTART_JOB ]; then

+    OPTS="$NVIDIA_DOCKER_PLUGIN_OPTS"

 end script
 
 post-start script

+        echo "$SOCK_FILE" > "$NVIDIA_DOCKER_PLUGIN_SPEC"
     fi
 end script
 
 post-stop script
-    DOCKER_PLUGIN_SPEC=/etc/docker/plugins/nvidia-docker.spec
-    rm -f "$DOCKER_PLUGIN_SPEC"
+    rm -f "$NVIDIA_DOCKER_PLUGIN_SPEC"
 end script

Author: Jonathan Calmels <jcalmels@nvidia.com>

    Add NVIDIA Docker version output

diff --git a/tools/Dockerfile.build b/tools/Dockerfile.build

-RUN go get -v -ldflags="-s" ./...
+RUN go get -v ./...

+CMD go install -v -ldflags="-s -X main.Version=$VERSION" ./...

author: Jonathan Calmels
patch:
commit 0a5b6be92d16b926490173395937cb12c583b1e4
Author: Jonathan Calmels <jcalmels@nvidia.com>
Date:   Tue Apr 12 11:03:08 2016 -0700

    Add support for systemd
---
 tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.service | 25 +++++++++++++++++++++++++
 1 file changed, 25 insertions(+)

diff --git a/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.service b/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.service
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..4afdf26
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.service
@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+[Unit]
+Description=NVIDIA Docker plugin
+Documentation=https://github.com/NVIDIA/nvidia-docker/wiki
+After=local-fs.target network.target
+Wants=docker.service
+
+[Service]
+Environment="SOCK_DIR=/var/lib/nvidia-docker"
+Environment="SOCK_FILE=unix:///var/lib/nvidia-docker/nvidia-docker.sock"
+Environment="SPEC_FILE=/etc/docker/plugins/nvidia-docker.spec"
+
+User=#PACKAGE#
+PermissionsStartOnly=true
+Restart=on-failure
+RestartSec=1
+TimeoutStartSec=0
+TimeoutStopSec=20
+
+ExecStart=#PREFIX#/nvidia-docker-plugin -s $SOCK_DIR
+ExecStartPost=/bin/sh -c '/bin/mkdir -p $( dirname $SPEC_FILE )'
+ExecStartPost=/bin/sh -c '/bin/echo $SOCK_FILE > $SPEC_FILE'
+ExecStopPost=/bin/rm -f $SPEC_FILE
+
+[Install]
+WantedBy=multi-user.target

author: Jonathan Calmels
patch:
commit 64510511e3fd0d00168eb076623854b0fcf1507d
Author: Jonathan Calmels <jcalmels@nvidia.com>
Date:   Mon Mar 28 18:31:56 2016 -0700

    Update README
---
 README.md | 40 +++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++-------
 1 file changed, 33 insertions(+), 7 deletions(-)

diff --git a/README.md b/README.md
index b66ace4..1e36902 100644
--- a/README.md
+++ b/README.md
@@ -13,18 +13,44 @@ A good place to start is to understand [why NVIDIA Docker](https://github.com/NV
 
 # Quick start
 
-Assuming the NVIDIA drivers and Docker are properly installed (see [installation](https://github.com/NVIDIA/nvidia-docker/wiki/Installation)):
+Assuming the NVIDIA drivers and Docker are properly installed (see [installation](https://github.com/NVIDIA/nvidia-docker/wiki/Installation)), there are two ways to install NVIDIA Docker:
 
+### Plugin install (Recommended)
+
+##### _Ubuntu distributions_
+```sh
+# Install nvidia-docker and nvidia-docker-plugin
+wget -P /tmp https://github.com/NVIDIA/nvidia-docker/releases/download/v1.0.0-beta.3/nvidia-docker_1.0.0.beta.3-1_amd64.deb
+sudo dpkg -i /tmp/nvidia-docker_1.0.0.beta.3-1_amd64.deb && rm /tmp/nvidia-docker*.deb
+
+# Test nvidia-smi
+nvidia-docker run --rm nvidia/cuda nvidia-smi
+```
+
+##### _Other distributions_
+```sh
+# Install nvidia-docker and nvidia-docker-plugin
+wget -P /tmp https://github.com/NVIDIA/nvidia-docker/releases/download/v1.0.0-beta.3/nvidia-docker_1.0.0.beta.3_amd64.tar.xz
+sudo tar --strip-components=1 -C /usr/bin -xvf /tmp/nvidia-docker_1.0.0.beta.3_amd64.tar.xz && rm /tmp/nvidia-docker*.tar.xz
+
+# Run nvidia-docker-plugin
+sudo -b nohup nvidia-docker-plugin > /tmp/nvidia-docker.log
+
+# Test nvidia-smi
+nvidia-docker run --rm nvidia/cuda nvidia-smi
+```
+
+### Standalone install
 ```sh
-git clone https://github.com/NVIDIA/nvidia-docker
-cd nvidia-docker
+# Install nvidia-docker and nvidia-docker-plugin
+wget -P /tmp https://github.com/NVIDIA/nvidia-docker/releases/download/v1.0.0-beta.3/nvidia-docker_1.0.0.beta.3_amd64.tar.xz
+sudo tar --strip-components=1 -C /usr/bin -xvf /tmp/nvidia-docker_1.0.0~beta.3_amd64.tar.xz && rm /tmp/nvidia-docker*.tar.xz
 
-# Initial setup
-sudo make install
+# One-time setup
 sudo nvidia-docker volume setup
 
-# Run nvidia-smi
-nvidia-docker run nvidia/cuda nvidia-smi
+# Test nvidia-smi
+nvidia-docker run --rm nvidia/cuda nvidia-smi
 ```

patch:
commit 302467b4715b6fa63846617c5073695654da8ffb
Author: Jonathan Calmels <jcalmels@nvidia.com>
Date:   Wed Mar 23 13:22:37 2016 -0700

    Check for unsupported Docker version
---
 tools/Makefile | 24 ++++++++++++++++--------
 1 file changed, 16 insertions(+), 8 deletions(-)

diff --git a/tools/Makefile b/tools/Makefile
index d18292e..f8409a3 100644
--- a/tools/Makefile
+++ b/tools/Makefile
@@ -13,18 +13,26 @@ USER_ID     := $(shell id -u)
 DOCKER_BIN := $(BIN_DIR)/nvidia-docker
 PLUGIN_BIN := $(BIN_DIR)/nvidia-docker-plugin
 
-PKG_NAME     := nvidia-docker
-PKG_VERSION  := 1.0.0~beta.2
-PKG_REV      := 1
-PKG_ARCH     := amd64
-PKG_DIR      := $(DIST_DIR)/$(PKG_NAME)-$(PKG_VERSION)
-PKG_FILENAME := $(PKG_NAME)_$(PKG_VERSION)_$(PKG_ARCH)
+PKG_NAME := nvidia-docker
+PKG_VERS := 1.0.0~beta.2
+PKG_REV  := 1
+PKG_ARCH := amd64
+PKG_DIR  := $(DIST_DIR)/$(PKG_NAME)-$(PKG_VERS)
+PKG_FILE := $(PKG_NAME)_$(PKG_VERS)_$(PKG_ARCH)
+
+DOCKER_VERS      := $(shell $(NV_DOCKER) version -f '{{.Client.Version}}')
+DOCKER_VERS_MAJ  := $(shell echo $(DOCKER_VERS) | cut -d. -f1)
+DOCKER_VERS_MIN  := $(shell echo $(DOCKER_VERS) | cut -d. -f2)
+DOCKER_SUPPORTED := $(shell [ $(DOCKER_VERS_MAJ) -eq 1 -a $(DOCKER_VERS_MIN) -ge 9 ] && echo true)
 
 .PHONY: all build install uninstall clean distclean tarball deb
 
 all: build
 
 build:
+ifneq ($(DOCKER_SUPPORTED),true)
+	$(error Unsupported Docker version)
+endif
 	@$(NV_DOCKER) build --build-arg UID=$(USER_ID) -t $(BUILD_IMAGE) -f Dockerfile.build $(CURDIR)
 	@mkdir -p $(BIN_DIR)
 	@$(NV_DOCKER) run --rm --net=host -v $(BIN_DIR):/go/bin $(BUILD_IMAGE)
@@ -46,7 +54,7 @@ distclean:
 
 tarball: build distclean
 	@mkdir -p $(DIST_DIR)
-	tar --transform='s;.*/;nvidia-docker/;' -caf $(DIST_DIR)/$(PKG_FILENAME).tar.xz $(BIN_DIR)/*
+	tar --transform='s;.*/;nvidia-docker/;' -caf $(DIST_DIR)/$(PKG_FILE).tar.xz $(BIN_DIR)/*
 
 deb: export DEBFULLNAME=NVIDIA CORPORATION
 deb: export DEBEMAIL=digits@nvidia.com
@@ -55,6 +63,6 @@ deb: build distclean
 	@mkdir -p $(PKG_DIR)
 	@cp -r $(BIN_DIR) $(PKG_DIR)
 	@-read -p "Update changelog? " yn; [ "$$yn" = "y" ] && \
-	dch -c $(CONF_DIR)/debian/changelog -v $(PKG_VERSION)-$(PKG_REV) --no-auto-nmu
+	dch -c $(CONF_DIR)/debian/changelog -v $(PKG_VERS)-$(PKG_REV) --no-auto-nmu
 	cd $(PKG_DIR) && dh_make -y -s -c bsd -d -t $(CONF_DIR)/debian --createorig
 	cd $(PKG_DIR) && debuild -e PREFIX=$(PREFIX) -i -us -uc -b

-func GenerateDockerArgs(image string) []string {

-	}

 func main() {

 	args := os.Args[1:]

-	assert(nvidia.Init())
-	defer func() { assert(nvidia.Shutdown()) }()
+	command, off, err := docker.ParseArgs(args)

-	command, i, err := docker.ParseArgs(args)
+	opt, i, err := docker.ParseArgs(args[off+1:], command)

-	if command == "create" || command == "run" || command == "volume" {
-		option, n, err = docker.ParseArgs(args[i+1:], command)
-		i += n + 1
-		assert(err)
+	off += i + 1
+
+	if command == "volume" && opt == "setup" {

+		assert(CreateLocalVolumes())

-	switch command {

-	default:

-	assert(nvidia.LoadUVM())

 }

commit 60afae04d97e99c30efaf3583a78005a160cce39
Author: Jonathan Calmels <jcalmels@nvidia.com>
Date:   Mon Mar 7 11:51:07 2016 -0800

    Simplify deb packaging updates
---
 tools/Makefile | 21 +++++++++++++--------
 1 file changed, 13 insertions(+), 8 deletions(-)

diff --git a/tools/Makefile b/tools/Makefile
index 31b522f..608222a 100644
--- a/tools/Makefile
+++ b/tools/Makefile
@@ -13,9 +13,12 @@ USER_ID     := $(shell id -u)
 DOCKER_BIN := $(BIN_DIR)/nvidia-docker
 PLUGIN_BIN := $(BIN_DIR)/nvidia-docker-plugin
 
-PKG_VERSION := nvidia-docker_1.0.0~beta
-PKG_DIR     := $(DIST_DIR)/$(subst _,-,$(PKG_VERSION))
-PKG_ARCH    := amd64
+PKG_NAME     := nvidia-docker
+PKG_VERSION  := 1.0.0~beta.2
+PKG_REV      := 1
+PKG_ARCH     := amd64
+PKG_DIR      := $(DIST_DIR)/$(PKG_NAME)-$(PKG_VERSION)
+PKG_FILENAME := $(PKG_NAME)_$(PKG_VERSION)_$(PKG_ARCH)
 
 .PHONY: all build install uninstall clean distclean tarball deb
 
@@ -42,14 +45,16 @@ distclean:
 	@rm -rf $(DIST_DIR)
 
 tarball: build distclean
-	mkdir -p $(DIST_DIR)
-	tar --transform='s;.*/;nvidia-docker/;' -caf $(DIST_DIR)/$(PKG_VERSION)_$(PKG_ARCH).tar.xz $(BIN_DIR)/*
+	@mkdir -p $(DIST_DIR)
+	tar --transform='s;.*/;nvidia-docker/;' -caf $(DIST_DIR)/$(PKG_FILENAME).tar.xz $(BIN_DIR)/*
 
 deb: export DEBFULLNAME=NVIDIA CORPORATION
 deb: export DEBEMAIL=digits@nvidia.com
 
 deb: build distclean
-	mkdir -p $(PKG_DIR)
-	cp -r $(BIN_DIR) $(PKG_DIR)
-	cd $(PKG_DIR) && dh_make -y -s -c bsd -p $(PKG_VERSION) -d -t $(CONF_DIR)/debian --createorig
+	@mkdir -p $(PKG_DIR)
+	@cp -r $(BIN_DIR) $(PKG_DIR)
+	@-read -p "Update changelog? " yn; [ "$$yn" = "y" ] && \
+	dch -c $(CONF_DIR)/debian/changelog -v $(PKG_VERSION)-$(PKG_REV) --no-auto-nmu
+	cd $(PKG_DIR) && dh_make -y -s -c bsd -d -t $(CONF_DIR)/debian --createorig
 	cd $(PKG_DIR) && debuild -e PREFIX=$(PREFIX) -i -us -uc -b

patch:
commit ec4415e73debf3fc980ec22828de0a1cab99a420
Author: Jonathan Calmels <jcalmels@nvidia.com>
Date:   Wed Mar 2 18:00:38 2016 -0800

    Add support for 361 drivers
---
 tools/src/nvidia/volumes.go | 78 +++++++++++++++++++++++++++++----------------
 1 file changed, 51 insertions(+), 27 deletions(-)

diff --git a/tools/src/nvidia/volumes.go b/tools/src/nvidia/volumes.go
index 4116f81..d610c7c 100644
--- a/tools/src/nvidia/volumes.go
+++ b/tools/src/nvidia/volumes.go
@@ -114,40 +114,54 @@ var Volumes = []VolumeInfo{
 				"nvidia-smi",              // System management interface
 			},
 			"libraries": {
+				// ------- X11 -------
+
 				//"libnvidia-cfg.so",  // GPU configuration (used by nvidia-xconfig)
 				//"libnvidia-gtk2.so", // GTK2 (used by nvidia-settings)
 				//"libnvidia-gtk3.so", // GTK3 (used by nvidia-settings)
-				//"libnvidia-wfb.so",  // Wrapped software rendering
+				//"libnvidia-wfb.so",  // Wrapped software rendering module for X server
+				//"libglx.so",         // GLX extension module for X server
+
+				// ----- Compute -----
 
-				"libnvidia-ml.so", // Management library
-				"libcuda.so",      // CUDA runtime
+				"libnvidia-ml.so",              // Management library
+				"libcuda.so",                   // CUDA driver library
+				"libnvidia-ptxjitcompiler.so",  // PTX-SASS JIT compiler (used by libcuda)
+				"libnvidia-fatbinaryloader.so", // fatbin loader (used by libcuda)
+				"libnvidia-opencl.so",          // NVIDIA OpenCL ICD
+				"libnvidia-compiler.so",        // NVVM-PTX compiler for OpenCL (used by libnvidia-opencl)
+				//"libOpenCL.so",               // OpenCL ICD loader
+
+				// ------ Video ------
 
-				//"libvdpau.so",       // VDPAU ICD loader
-				//"libvdpau_trace.so", // VDPAU debug trace
 				"libvdpau_nvidia.so",  // NVIDIA VDPAU ICD
 				"libnvidia-encode.so", // Video encoder
 				"libnvcuvid.so",       // Video decoder
-
-				"libnvidia-fbc.so", // Framebuffer capture
-				"libnvidia-ifr.so", // OpenGL framebuffer capture
-
-				//"libOpenCL.so",        // OpenCL ICD loader
-				"libnvidia-opencl.so",   // NVIDIA OpenCL ICD
-				"libnvidia-compiler.so", // PTX compiler (used by libnvidia-opencl)
-
-				//"libglx.so",         // GLX extension module for X server
-				"libGL.so",            // OpenGL / GLX
-				"libnvidia-glcore.so", // OpenGL core (used by libGL and libglx)
-				"libnvidia-tls.so",    // Thread local storage (used by libGL and libglx)
-
-				//"libOpenGL.so",       // OpenGL ICD loader
-				//"libEGL.so",          // EGL ICD loader
-				//"libGLdispatch.so",   // OpenGL dispatch (used by libOpenGL and libEGL)
-				"libEGL_nvidia.so",     // NVIDIA EGL ICD
-				"libGLESv1_CM.so",      // OpenGL ES v1 common profile
-				"libGLESv2.so",         // OpenGL ES v2
-				"libnvidia-eglcore.so", // EGL core (used by libGLES and libEGL_nvidia)
-				"libnvidia-glsi.so",    // OpenGL system interaction (used by libEGL_nvidia)
+				"libnvidia-fbc.so",    // Framebuffer capture
+				"libnvidia-ifr.so",    // OpenGL framebuffer capture
+
+				// ----- Graphic -----
+
+				// XXX In an ideal world we would only mount nvidia_* vendor specific libraries and
+				// install ICD loaders inside the container. However, for backward compatibility reason
+				// we need to mount everything. This will hopefully change once GLVND is well established.
+
+				"libGL.so",         // OpenGL/GLX legacy _or_ compatibility wrapper (GLVND)
+				"libGLX.so",        // GLX ICD loader (GLVND)
+				"libOpenGL.so",     // OpenGL ICD loader (GLVND)
+				"libGLESv1_CM.so",  // OpenGL ES v1 common profile legacy _or_ ICD loader (GLVND)
+				"libGLESv2.so",     // OpenGL ES v2 legacy _or_ ICD loader (GLVND)
+				"libEGL.so",        // EGL ICD loader
+				"libGLdispatch.so", // OpenGL dispatch (GLVND) (used by libOpenGL, libEGL and libGLES*)
+
+				"libGLX_nvidia.so",       // OpenGL/GLX ICD (GLVND)
+				"libEGL_nvidia.so",       // EGL ICD (GLVND)
+				"libGLESv2_nvidia.so",    // OpenGL ES v2 ICD (GLVND)
+				"libGLESv1_CM_nvidia.so", // OpenGL ES v1 common profile ICD (GLVND)
+				"libnvidia-eglcore.so",   // EGL core (used by libGLES* or libGLES*_nvidia and libEGL_nvidia)
+				"libnvidia-glcore.so",    // OpenGL core (used by libGL or libGLX_nvidia)
+				"libnvidia-tls.so",       // Thread local storage (used by libGL or libGLX_nvidia)
+				"libnvidia-glsi.so",      // OpenGL system interaction (used by libEGL_nvidia)
 			},
 		},
 	},
@@ -156,6 +170,7 @@ var Volumes = []VolumeInfo{
 func blacklisted(file string, obj *elf.File) (bool, error) {
 	lib := regexp.MustCompile("^.*/lib([\\w-]+)\\.so[\\d.]*$")
 	glcore := regexp.MustCompile("libnvidia-e?glcore.so")
+	gldispatch := regexp.MustCompile(`libGLdispatch\.so`)
 
 	if m := lib.FindStringSubmatch(file); m != nil {
 		switch m[1] {
@@ -171,7 +186,7 @@ func blacklisted(file string, obj *elf.File) (bool, error) {
 				return false, err
 			}
 			for _, d := range deps {
-				if glcore.MatchString(d) {
+				if glcore.MatchString(d) || gldispatch.MatchString(d) {
 					return false, nil
 				}
 			}
@@ -241,6 +256,15 @@ func (v *Volume) Create(s FileCloneStrategy) (err error) {
 					!os.IsExist(err.(*os.LinkError).Err) {
 					return err
 				}
+				// XXX GLVND requires this symlink for indirect GLX support
+				// It won't be needed once we have an indirect GLX vendor neutral library.
+				if strings.HasPrefix(soname[0], "libGLX_nvidia") {
+					l = strings.Replace(l, "GLX_nvidia", "GLX_indirect", 1)
+					if err := os.Symlink(f, l); err != nil &&
+						!os.IsExist(err.(*os.LinkError).Err) {
+						return err
+					}
+				}
 			}
 		}
 	}

author: Felix Abecassis
message: Allow images to be run using their hash value
patch:
commit e7b792253f0d0ad1bed19a3236db0ac58aaf9563
Author: Felix Abecassis <fabecassis@nvidia.com>
Date:   Fri Jan 22 15:14:45 2016 -0800

    Allow images to be run using their hash value
    
    Use "docker inspect" instead of "docker images".
---
 tools/src/docker/docker.go | 8 +++++---
 1 file changed, 5 insertions(+), 3 deletions(-)

diff --git a/tools/src/docker/docker.go b/tools/src/docker/docker.go
index ca6387d..b7dfea0 100644
--- a/tools/src/docker/docker.go
+++ b/tools/src/docker/docker.go
@@ -110,10 +110,12 @@ func InspectVolume(name string) (string, error) {
 }
 
 func ImageExists(image string) (bool, error) {
-	b, err := docker(false, "images", "-q", image)
-	if err != nil || len(b) == 0 {
-		return false, err
+	_, err := docker(false, "inspect", "--type=image", image)
+	if err != nil {
+		// We can't know whether the image was missing or if the daemon was unreachable.
+		return false, nil
 	}
+
 	return true, nil
 }

author: Jonathan Calmels
Felix Abecassis
message: Pass all environment variables to the Docker CLI
patch:
commit d02f06dede423e926d06291726a90d24487fea7e
Author: Felix Abecassis <fabecassis@nvidia.com>
Date:   Fri Jan 15 15:23:58 2016 -0800

    Pass all environment variables to the Docker CLI
    
    Fixes: #35
---
 tools/src/docker/docker.go | 10 +---------
 1 file changed, 1 insertion(+), 9 deletions(-)

diff --git a/tools/src/docker/docker.go b/tools/src/docker/docker.go
index 7461f04..ca6387d 100644
--- a/tools/src/docker/docker.go
+++ b/tools/src/docker/docker.go
@@ -9,7 +9,6 @@ import (
 	"os"
 	"os/exec"
 	"regexp"
-	"strings"
 	"syscall"
 )
 
@@ -124,18 +123,11 @@ func ImagePull(image string) error {
 }
 
 func Docker(arg ...string) error {
-	var env []string
-
 	cmd, err := exec.LookPath(dockerCmd[0])
 	if err != nil {
 		return err
 	}
 	args := append(dockerCmd, arg...)
 
-	for _, e := range os.Environ() {
-		if strings.HasPrefix(e, "DOCKER_") {
-			env = append(env, e)
-		}
-	}
-	return syscall.Exec(cmd, args, env)
+	return syscall.Exec(cmd, args, os.Environ())
 }

commit e124d918557e54f6d0c7b49a44493aa5616d0d4b
Author: Jonathan Calmels <jcalmels@nvidia.com>
Date:   Thu Jan 14 16:34:32 2016 -0800

    Add Ubuntu package generation
    
    Closes: #33
---
 tools/Makefile                                    | 48 +++++++++++++++++------
 tools/conf/debian/changelog                       |  5 +++
 tools/conf/debian/compat                          |  1 +
 tools/conf/debian/control                         | 16 ++++++++
 tools/conf/debian/copyright                       | 36 +++++++++++++++++
 tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.default           |  2 +
 tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.install           |  1 +
 tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.lintian-overrides |  3 ++
 tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.postinst          | 26 ++++++++++++
 tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.postrm            | 22 +++++++++++
 tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.upstart           | 41 +++++++++++++++++++
 tools/conf/debian/rules                           | 19 +++++++++
 12 files changed, 208 insertions(+), 12 deletions(-)

diff --git a/tools/Makefile b/tools/Makefile
index ad8b7d2..31b522f 100644
--- a/tools/Makefile
+++ b/tools/Makefile
@@ -1,31 +1,55 @@
 # Copyright (c) 2015-2016, NVIDIA CORPORATION. All rights reserved.
 
 NV_DOCKER ?= docker
+PREFIX    ?= /usr/bin
 
 BIN_DIR  := $(CURDIR)/bin
-USER_ID  := $(shell id -u)
+CONF_DIR := $(CURDIR)/conf
+DIST_DIR := $(CURDIR)/dist
 
-IMAGE  := nvdocker-build
-PREFIX := /usr/bin
-DOCKER := $(BIN_DIR)/nvidia-docker
-PLUGIN := $(BIN_DIR)/nvidia-docker-plugin
+BUILD_IMAGE := nvdocker-build
+USER_ID     := $(shell id -u)
 
-.PHONY: all build install clean
+DOCKER_BIN := $(BIN_DIR)/nvidia-docker
+PLUGIN_BIN := $(BIN_DIR)/nvidia-docker-plugin
+
+PKG_VERSION := nvidia-docker_1.0.0~beta
+PKG_DIR     := $(DIST_DIR)/$(subst _,-,$(PKG_VERSION))
+PKG_ARCH    := amd64
+
+.PHONY: all build install uninstall clean distclean tarball deb
 
 all: build
 
 build:
-	@$(NV_DOCKER) build --build-arg UID=$(USER_ID) -t $(IMAGE) -f Dockerfile.build $(CURDIR)
+	@$(NV_DOCKER) build --build-arg UID=$(USER_ID) -t $(BUILD_IMAGE) -f Dockerfile.build $(CURDIR)
 	@mkdir -p $(BIN_DIR)
-	@$(NV_DOCKER) run --rm -v $(BIN_DIR):/go/bin $(IMAGE)
+	@$(NV_DOCKER) run --rm -v $(BIN_DIR):/go/bin $(BUILD_IMAGE)
 
 install: all
-	install -D -T -m 755 $(DOCKER) $(PREFIX)/$(notdir $(DOCKER))
-	install -D -T -m 755 $(PLUGIN) $(PREFIX)/$(notdir $(PLUGIN))
+	install -D -T -m 755 $(DOCKER_BIN) $(PREFIX)/$(notdir $(DOCKER_BIN))
+	install -D -T -m 755 $(PLUGIN_BIN) $(PREFIX)/$(notdir $(PLUGIN_BIN))
 
 uninstall:
-	$(RM) $(PREFIX)/$(notdir $(DOCKER)) $(PREFIX)/$(notdir $(PLUGIN))
+	$(RM) $(PREFIX)/$(notdir $(DOCKER_BIN))
+	$(RM) $(PREFIX)/$(notdir $(PLUGIN_BIN))
 
 clean:
-	-@$(NV_DOCKER) rmi -f $(IMAGE) golang 2> /dev/null
+	-@$(NV_DOCKER) rmi -f $(BUILD_IMAGE) golang 2> /dev/null
 	@rm -rf $(BIN_DIR)
+
+distclean:
+	@rm -rf $(DIST_DIR)
+
+tarball: build distclean
+	mkdir -p $(DIST_DIR)
+	tar --transform='s;.*/;nvidia-docker/;' -caf $(DIST_DIR)/$(PKG_VERSION)_$(PKG_ARCH).tar.xz $(BIN_DIR)/*
+
+deb: export DEBFULLNAME=NVIDIA CORPORATION
+deb: export DEBEMAIL=digits@nvidia.com
+
+deb: build distclean
+	mkdir -p $(PKG_DIR)
+	cp -r $(BIN_DIR) $(PKG_DIR)
+	cd $(PKG_DIR) && dh_make -y -s -c bsd -p $(PKG_VERSION) -d -t $(CONF_DIR)/debian --createorig
+	cd $(PKG_DIR) && debuild -e PREFIX=$(PREFIX) -i -us -uc -b

diff --git a/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.postinst b/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.postinst
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..d6d2dc6
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.postinst
@@ -0,0 +1,26 @@
+#!/bin/sh
+
+set -e
+
+NVIDIA_DOCKER_USER=#PACKAGE#
+NVIDIA_DOCKER_ROOT=/var/lib/nvidia-docker
+NVIDIA_DOCKER_PLUGIN=#PREFIX#/nvidia-docker-plugin
+
+case "$1" in
+    configure)
+        adduser --system --home "$NVIDIA_DOCKER_ROOT" "$NVIDIA_DOCKER_USER"
+        setcap cap_fowner+pe "$NVIDIA_DOCKER_PLUGIN"
+    ;;
+
+    abort-upgrade|abort-remove|abort-deconfigure)
+    ;;
+
+    *)
+        echo "postinst called with unknown argument \`$1'" >&2
+        exit 1
+    ;;
+esac
+
+#DEBHELPER#
+
+exit 0
diff --git a/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.postrm b/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.postrm
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..e2722af
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.postrm
@@ -0,0 +1,22 @@
+#!/bin/sh
+
+set -e
+
+NVIDIA_DOCKER_USER=#PACKAGE#
+NVIDIA_DOCKER_ROOT=/var/lib/nvidia-docker
+
+case "$1" in
+    purge|remove|upgrade|failed-upgrade|abort-install|abort-upgrade|disappear)
+        deluser --quiet --system "$NVIDIA_DOCKER_USER"
+        rm -rf "$NVIDIA_DOCKER_ROOT"
+    ;;
+
+    *)
+        echo "postrm called with unknown argument \`$1'" >&2
+        exit 1
+    ;;
+esac
+
+#DEBHELPER#
+
+exit 0
diff --git a/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.upstart b/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.upstart
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..77d21a3
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tools/conf/debian/nvidia-docker.upstart
@@ -0,0 +1,41 @@
+description "NVIDIA Docker plugin"
+
+start on (local-filesystems and net-device-up)
+stop on runlevel [!2345]
+
+respawn
+respawn limit 5 10
+
+kill timeout 20
+
+script
+    NVIDIA_DOCKER_PLUGIN_OPTS=
+    if [ -f /etc/default/$UPSTART_JOB ]; then
+        . /etc/default/$UPSTART_JOB
+    fi
+
+    NVIDIA_DOCKER_USER=#PACKAGE#
+    NVIDIA_DOCKER_PLUGIN=#PREFIX#/nvidia-docker-plugin
+    exec start-stop-daemon -S -u "$NVIDIA_DOCKER_USER" -c "$NVIDIA_DOCKER_USER" \
+                           -a "$NVIDIA_DOCKER_PLUGIN" -- $NVIDIA_DOCKER_PLUGIN_OPTS
+end script
+
+post-start script
+    NVIDIA_DOCKER_PLUGIN_OPTS=
+    if [ -f /etc/default/$UPSTART_JOB ]; then
+        . /etc/default/$UPSTART_JOB
+    fi
+
+    SOCK_OPT=$( echo $NVIDIA_DOCKER_PLUGIN_OPTS | grep -oP -- '-s\s+\K\S+' )
+    if [ -n "$SOCK_OPT" ]; then
+        NVIDIA_DOCKER_PLUGIN_SOCK=$SOCK_OPT/nvidia-docker.sock
+        DOCKER_PLUGIN_SPEC=/etc/docker/plugins/nvidia-docker.spec
+        mkdir -p $( dirname "$DOCKER_PLUGIN_SPEC" )
+        echo "unix://$NVIDIA_DOCKER_PLUGIN_SOCK" > "$DOCKER_PLUGIN_SPEC"
+    fi
+end script
+
+post-stop script
+    DOCKER_PLUGIN_SPEC=/etc/docker/plugins/nvidia-docker.spec
+    rm -f "$DOCKER_PLUGIN_SPEC"
+end script
diff --git a/tools/conf/debian/rules b/tools/conf/debian/rules
new file mode 100755
index 0000000..7c77019
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tools/conf/debian/rules
@@ -0,0 +1,19 @@
+#!/usr/bin/make -f
+# -*- makefile -*-
+
+#export DH_VERBOSE=1
+
+fill = find debian -regex 'debian/#PACKAGE#\.\w+' -type f | \
+       xargs sed -i 's;\#$(1)\#;$(2);g'
+
+override_dh_shlibdeps:
+	dh_shlibdeps --dpkg-shlibdeps-params=--ignore-missing-info
+
+override_dh_prep: fill_templates
+	dh_prep
+
+fill_templates:
+	$(call fill,PREFIX,$(PREFIX))
+
+%:
+	dh $@
